1000639913.english: - Comforting the deeply dejected Sleipnir, I boarded the elevator to enter the ship.
1000639913.korean: - 잔뜩 의기소침해진 슬레이프니르를 위로하며, 선내로 들어가는 엘리베이터에 올랐다.

1000639915.english: ...If you are a real commander, show me the proof!

1000639918.english: Why on earth did you have to present something like that as evidence...
1000639918.korean: 왜 증거를 대도 하필 그런걸 대는 거야...

1000639920.english: Uh... um... just... I wanted to look around a bit.
1000639920.korean: 으응... 그, 그냥... 좀 둘러보고 싶어서.

1000639922.english: Hraesvelgr usually takes charge of putting it together... but as the leader, I want to look into it too...
1000639922.korean: 흐레스벨그가 전담해서 짜주긴 하는데... 그래도 리더인 나도 알아보려구...

1000639923.english: - Sleipnir spoke as if embarrassed, and each of her fingertips was wrapped in a bandage.
1000639923.korean: - 민망한듯 말하는 슬레이프니르의 손가락 끝마다 밴드가 감겨 있었다.

1000639925.english: But it's okay. I applied some medicine.

1000639926.english: No, I'll do well. Because it's what I want to do.
1000639926.korean: 아니, 잘 할거야. 내가 하고 싶은 거니까.

1000639927.english: I want to be both a soldier Sky Knight and an idol Sky Knight.
1000639927.korean: 군인 스카이나이츠도, 아이돌 스카이나이츠도 나는 전부 하고 싶어.

1000639928.english: So... you'll do well on both counts.

1000639929.english: Darn, I was trying to be serious!

1000639930.english: - Sleipnir puckered her lips and stepped onto the dark stage.
1000639930.korean: - 슬레이프니르는 입술을 삐죽이며 어두운 무대 위로 올라섰다.

1000639931.english: - Starlight dimly shone on Sleipnir standing center stage.
1000639931.korean: - 무대 중앙에 선 슬레이프니르를 별빛이 어슴푸레 비췄다.

1000639932.english: Producer, should I sing for you?

1000639933.english: What do you take the greatest idol before the world's end for? I can do it just fine even without accompaniment.
1000639933.korean: 멸망 전 최고의 아이돌을 뭘로 보는 거야? 무반주로도 가뿐하다구.

1000639934.english: - Clearing her throat with a "Hmm," Sleipnir looked straight at me with her usual confident expression.
1000639934.korean: - 흠흠 하고 목을 가다듬은 슬레이프니르는, 평소대로의 자신감 넘치는 얼굴로 나를 똑바로 바라봤다.

1000639935.english: We've put everything we really want to say into the song.
1000639935.korean: 우리가 진짜 하고 싶은 말은 노래에 전부 담았어.

1000639936.english: So… just, just listen to this song casually.
1000639936.korean: 그러니까... 이, 이 노래는 그냥 적당히 흘려 들어.

1000639937.english: - Soon, the stage where starlight was falling began to be filled with Sleipnir's voice.
1000639937.korean: - 곧 별빛이 내리는 무대가 슬레이프니르의 목소리로 채워지기 시작했다.

1000639938.english: - A concert under the night sky, watched alone in an empty audience, seemed like something I'd remember for a long time.
1000639938.korean: - 텅 빈 관객석에서 혼자 보는, 밤하늘 아래의 콘서트는 오랫동안 기억에 남을 것 같았다.

1000639941.english: How's the vocal practice going? Is it going well?

1000639944.english: Then I'll come again later. Keep working hard.
1000639944.korean: 그럼 나중에 또 올게. 열심히 해.

1000639945.english: How about taking a short break…

1000639946.english: Should I visit the Sky Knights' dorm?

1000639947.english: Relax your body a bit more.

1000639949.english: How is it? Feels good, right?

1000639951.english: You weren't thinking anything weird, were you?

1000639954.english: Because it was full of affection?

1000639955.english: Aren't you pushing yourself too hard?

1000639963.english: …But I do feel a bit tired.

1000639964.english: …Might need to stay a bit longer to really know.

1000639970.english: This is the end of the line.

1000639971.english: Who is it this time… Ah.

1000639972.english: But… we don't have to hide MoMo anymore, right?
1000639972.korean: 근데... 이제 모모는 안 숨겨도 되지 않아?

1000639973.english: Even if they don't understand, we could watch together sometimes. If you want, even right now-
1000639973.korean: 이해는 못해도 가끔 같이 볼수는 있잖아. 뭐하면 지금이라도-

1000639974.english: W-was that really such a surprise?

1000639976.english: Um... well, I actually know her pretty well. Since we're close...
1000639976.korean: 어... 그, 그래도 꽤 아는 편이야. 본인이랑 친하니까…

1000639977.english: Aren't there things you can enjoy even if you don't understand them? Like the first episode.
1000639977.korean: 잘 몰라도 재밌게 볼 수 있는것도 있지 않아? 1화라던가.

1000639982.english: I like Hraesvelgr, so I'll probably come to like what someone I like also likes.
1000639982.korean: 나는 흐레스벨그를 좋아하니까, 좋아하는 사람이 좋아하는 게 좋아질거야.

1000639987.english: What are you doing over there… Ah, right.

1000639992.english: It's okay. Let's head down too.

1000639993.english: Sleipnir trained for a year to debut as an idol—

1000639994.english: There's nothing more certain than that.

1000639995.english: But what are you doing at this hour?

1000639996.english: Were you planning out your route?

1000639998.english: You don't have to try so hard. I was the one who asked for this—
1000639998.korean: 너무 잘하려고 하지 않아도 돼. 내가 하자고 한 거니까-

1000639999.english: Ooh~ Look at you, saying cool things~

1000640001.english: Let's drop by the practice room.

1000640002.english: Guess I should take a look around the deck.

1000640004.english: If it's something like that… then I guess I have to say I know absolutely nothing.

1000640006.english: Wow, what's this? Wait a minute, let me guess. This is a ring used when proposing. And the Commander...&nWho should I hand it to? Oh, am I the only one here? Wait, wait! Th, ah, uh... Do I have to answer right now?&nUh… ! Okay! Instead… make me the happiest woman in the world. Is that a promise, honey?&n
1000640006.korean: 우왓, 이게 뭐야? 잠깐만, 내가 추리해 볼게. 이건 프러포즈할 때 사용하는 반지야. 그리고 사령관이&n그걸 건넬 상대는… 아, 여기 나밖에 없네? 잠시, 잠시만! 그, 아, 저… 지금 당장 대답해야 돼?&n으…! 알았어! 대신에… 날 세상에서 가장 행복한 여자로 만들어줘. 약속이야, 자기야?

1000640007.english: Wow... there isn't a single empty seat.

1000640008.english: I wonder if it's been a while since all the crew members have gathered in one place like this...?
1000640008.korean: 승조원들이 이렇게 전부 한자리에 모인 건 오랜만이려나...?

1000640010.english: Good job with the reconnaissance. That was a close call.

1000640011.english: I was just going to take one more lap, but...

1000640013.english: Thanks. Did you come back from scouting?

1000640014.english: No, Aurora was distributing them over there.

1000640015.english: Ah, so these are the snacks they said they would hand out. It really feels like a festival.
1000640015.korean: 아, 나눠준다던 간식이구나. 진짜 축제 분위기 나네.

1000640016.english: Yeah. And since they're sending it to all our garrisons and forward bases as well, practically everyone is gathering.
1000640016.korean: 응. 거기에 우리 주둔지나 전진기지에도 전부 송출한다니까, 사실상 전원이 모이는거야.

1000640017.english: Thanks to that, we also raised our alert level and increased sorties...
1000640017.korean: 덕분에 우리도 경계태세 올라가서 출격도 늘어났구...

1000640018.english: Tiamat, don't you want to become idols like them, the Sky Knights?
1000640018.korean: 티아멧은 쟤네, 스카이나이츠처럼 아이돌 되고 싶은 생각은 없어?

1000640020.english: Then, besides combat, what do you want to try?

1000640021.english: You hardly do anything other than sorties and training.
1000640021.korean: 너, 출격이랑 훈련 말고는 거의 아무것도 안하잖아.

1000640028.english: Let's enjoy the stage prepared by us and the producers together!
1000640028.korean: 우리들과 프로듀서가 준비한 무대, 함께 즐기자!

1000640030.english: - The performance has already started, and no matter how much they drag it out until the ending song, it will be just over an hour.
1000640030.korean: - 공연은 이미 시작됐고, 엔딩곡까지 아무리 시간을 끌어봐야 한시간 남짓.

1000640031.english: - We are restricting movement and mobilizing available personnel to search, but...
1000640031.korean: - 이동 반경을 제한하고, 가용한 인력을 동원해 수색하고는 있지만...

1000640032.english: As you instructed, I conveyed the relevant information to the commanders on guard.
1000640032.korean: 말씀대로 경계중인 지휘관들에게 해당 내용을 전달했어요.

1000640033.english: The message is that they will search the assigned area to the extent that it does not interfere with the mission.
1000640033.korean: 임무에 차질이 생기지 않는 선에서, 맡은 구역 내를 수색하겠다는 전언이에요.

1000640034.english: Except for a minimum number of personnel, all of the Orca's crew members are in the audience seats to watch the performance.
1000640034.korean: 최소한의 인원을 제외하면, 오르카 호의 승조원들은 전부 공연을 보기 위해 관객석에 있어요.

1000640035.english: Whether there will be the capacity to perform missions other than border patrol...
1000640035.korean: 경계 외에 다른 임무를 수행할 여력이 될지...

1000640036.english: - I took the panel from Constantia, who was trailing off, and checked the personnel deployment status.
1000640036.korean: - 말끝을 흐리는 콘스탄챠에게서 패널을 받아들고 인원 배치 현황을 확인했다.

1000640037.english: Yes. Cerestia is leading the charge, and the technical team says there are no particular issues.
1000640037.korean: 네. 세레스티아 님이 진두지휘 중이고, 기술팀에서도 특별한 문제는 없다고 해요.

1000640038.english: We received reports from all external units that signal reception is good.
1000640038.korean: 모든 외부 부대로부터 신호 수신 양호하다는 보고를 받았어요.

1000640039.english: The signal encryption algorithm on the communications satellite deployed by Aeda is also functioning normally. Even if you trace the signal back, you won't be able to pinpoint the location of the Orca.
1000640039.korean: 에이다 님이 배치해주신 통신 위성의 신호 암호화 알고리즘도 정상 작동 중이에요. 신호를 역추적한다고 해도 오르카 호의 위치를 특정할 수는 없을 거예요.

1000640041.english: The morale of the members will surely rise significantly. After all, events like this allow them to forget reality, even if only for a while.
1000640041.korean: 대원들의 사기가 크게 오를테죠. 이런 행사는 현실을 잠시나마 잊게 해주니까요.

1000640043.english: When we Bio-roids, who were originally soldiers... no, merely expendables, see that we can realize our selves through means other than combat like this, everyone will look forward to the new world Master will create.
1000640043.korean: 원래 군인... 아니, 소모품일 뿐인 저희 바이오로이드들이 이렇게, 전투가 아닌 방법으로 자아를 실현할 수 있다는 것을 보면, 다들 주인님께서 만들 새로운 세상을 기대하게 될 거예요.

1000640044.english: - The longer I serve as commander, the more I feel that even the smallest decisions carry political and military intentions.
1000640044.korean: - 사령관으로 지내는 시간이 길어질수록, 작은 결정 하나하나에도 정치적, 군사적 의도가 담기게 되는 것을 느낀다.

1000640045.english: We all know that Master never makes wrong judgments.
1000640045.korean: 주인님께서 그릇된 판단을 내리지 않으신다는 건 저희 모두가 알아요.

1000640046.english: After all, the intentions behind the decision are ultimately all for our own good.
1000640046.korean: 결정에 담긴 의도도 결국, 전부 저희를 위한 것들이니까요.

1000640047.english: That is natural, Master. After all, the position makes the man.
1000640047.korean: 그건 자연스러운 일이에요, 주인님. 자리가 사람을 만드는 법이니까요.

1000640048.english: And... actually, we're having fun. Aren't we?
1000640048.korean: 그리고... 실제로 저희는 즐거워요. 그렇지 않나요?

1000640049.english: Yes. It is a new experience to take on the administrative work for a performance like this.
1000640049.korean: 네. 이런 공연의 행정 업무를 맡는 건 새로운 경험이니까요.

1000640050.english: I will be able to be of even more help to my master in the future.
1000640050.korean: 앞으로 더욱 주인님께 보탬이 될 수 있을 거예요.

1000640051.english: - smiled back at the two sending me smiles of trust and checked the time. Was the first song about to end...?
1000640051.korean: - 신뢰가 담긴 미소를 보내는 둘에게 마주 웃어주며 시간을 체크했다. 슬슬 첫 번째 곡이 끝날 참인가...

1000640052.english: Yes. I will instruct them to conduct interviews between the songs.
1000640052.korean: 네. 곡 사이사이에 인터뷰를 진행하도록 지시할게요.

1000640053.english: - I gave instructions and looked back at the monitor.
1000640053.korean: - 지시를 내리고 다시 모니터에 시선을 주었다.

1000640054.english: - Some of the dots appearing on the map are patrolling a certain area.
1000640054.korean: - 지도에 떠오른 점들의 일부가 일정 구역을 순찰하고 있다.

1000640055.english: - I feel like I’m largely to blame for Muse running away. She’s so shy and reserved, and yet I just pushed her onto the stage without thinking...
1000640055.korean: - 뮤즈가 도망친 것에는 내 책임이 크다는 생각이 든다. 그렇게 소심하고 낯을 가리는데, 덜컥 무대에 오르라고 등을 떠밀었으니...

1000640056.english: - Suppressing a sigh, I decided to check the progress of the stage.
1000640056.korean: - 한숨을 참으며, 무대 진행상황을 확인해 보기로 했다.

1000640059.english: This is a really big problem.

1000640060.english: If the Queen says that, it doesn't seem like a big deal at all...
1000640060.korean: 여왕님이 그렇게 말하면 전혀 큰일 안 같거든...

1000640061.english: Oh my, that can't be true! I'm really flustered.

1000640062.english: For now, I will proceed with the interview as instructed by the Commander, um...
1000640062.korean: 일단 사령관님 지시대로 인터뷰는 진행하고, 음...

1000640063.english: Ah. It would be good to prepare for audience participation. I'll tell the staff to look for people with a story in advance.
1000640063.korean: 아. 관객 참여라도 준비하는 게 좋겠어요. 진행 요원들에게 미리 사연있는 분들을 찾아보라고 말해둘게요.

1000640067.english: Hello! The Orca, and everyone watching the performance from all over the world!
1000640067.korean: 안녕하세요~! 오르카 호, 그리고 세계 각지에서 공연을 보고 계신 여러분!

1000640068.english: Greetings from A-14B Spriggan, the MC!

1000640069.english: The first of the stages set to heat up tonight! Join us for "Lover Lover" by the supersonic idol group Sky Knights!
1000640069.korean: 오늘 밤을 뜨겁게 달궈줄 무대들 중 그 첫번째! 초음속 아이돌 스카이나이츠의 Lover Lover 함께하셨습니다!

1000640070.english: Didn't we agree not to use that nickname?!
1000640070.korean: 저 별칭 안쓰기로 한 거 아니었어?!

1000640071.english: Ah, I forgot to pass that on.

1000640073.english: Before proceeding to the next stage, let's have a brief chat with two members of Sky Knights.
1000640073.korean: 다음 무대를 진행하기 전에, 스카이나이츠의 두 분과 잠깐 이야기를 나눠보도록 하겠습니다.

1000640074.english: I heard that this first song is filled with Miss Sleipnir's personal taste. Is that correct?
1000640074.korean: 듣기로, 이 첫번째 곡은 다름아닌 슬레이프니르 양의 취향이 듬뿍 담긴 곡으로 알고 있는데요. 맞나요?

1000640075.english: Yeah! It's a song I made while training to become an idol!
1000640075.korean: 응! 내가 아이돌이 되기 위해 수련할 때 만든 곡이야!

1000640078.english: It was before I met the commander, so it was a little different from now.
1000640078.korean: 사령관을 만나기 전이라, 지금이랑은 조금 달랐지만.

1000640079.english: Oho, for example, what were the differences?

1000640081.english: Ah... that's certainly true. The lyrics were very overtly sweet and cringeworthy.
1000640081.korean: 아... 확실히 그렇네요. 아주 노골적으로 달콤하고 오그라드는 가사였죠.

1000640083.english: I'm not praising you, you idiot.

1000640085.english: Could you please give us a brief introduction to the next song?
1000640085.korean: 혹시 다음 곡에 대한 간단한 소개, 부탁드릴 수 있을까요?

1000640087.korean: 이번 곡은... 두근☆두근 반짝★반짝 이라는 곡이야.

1000640088.english: Since it’s a song that captures the feelings of a girl who wants to confess her love even though she’s shy... I think people will really relate to it.
1000640088.korean: 부끄러워하면서도 사랑을 고백하고 싶어하는 소녀의 마음을 담은 곡이니까... 고, 공감은 잘 될 거라고 생각해.

1000640089.english: Oh! In that case, could that possibly be a reflection of their own feelings?!
1000640089.korean: 오오! 그렇다면 혹시 그건, 본인의 심정을 반영한 걸까요?!

1000640091.english: Miss Griffon, who neither denies nor affirms!
1000640091.korean: 부정도 긍정도 하지 않는 그리폰 양!

1000640092.english: heard that the Commander spared no effort in supporting the Sky Knights' idol debut, both financially and otherwise. I wonder what has happened in the meantime!
1000640092.korean: 사령관님은 스카이나이츠의 아이돌 데뷔를 위해 물심양면 지원을 아끼지 않으셨다고 들었는데요, 과연 그동안 어떤 일이 있었을지!

1000640093.english: Or, something right before going on stage—

1000640096.english: But until you prove it yourself, all possibilities remain open!
1000640096.korean: 하지만 스스로 아니라는 것을 증명하기 전까지는, 모든 가능성이 열려있는 법이죠!

1000640097.english: What am I supposed to do...

1000640098.english: Leaving the suspicions behind, the next stage is!
1000640098.korean: 의혹을 뒤로한 채 이어지는 다음 무대는!

1000640099.english: Mint Choco Shake, a unit consisting of Griffon, Lindtbloom, and Black Hound, sings! Heart-pounding twinkle-twinkle!
1000640099.korean: 그리폰, 린트블룸, 블랙 하운드로 구성된 유닛, 민트초코쉐이크가 부릅니다! 두근☆두근 반짝★반짝!

1000640100.english: Please watch closely to see if they execute the choreography naturally!

1000640102.english: How is it? Did they say they found it?

1000640105.english: The producer will definitely find out. Don't worry too much.

1000640106.english: However, we are severely lacking in personnel and time for the search.
1000640106.korean: 그래도 수색할 인원과 시간이 너무 부족합니다.

1000640107.english: First, we must prepare for the worst-case scenario...

1000640109.english: Muse will definitely sing with us!

1000640112.english: You promised! Besides, Muse is an honorary Sky Knights member!
1000640112.korean: 약속했잖아! 거기다 뮤즈는 명예 스카이나이츠 대원이라구!

1000640113.english: There is nothing more you can do, is there?
1000640113.korean: 더이상 할 수 있는 일이 없지 않습니까.

1000640114.english: There is nothing we can do but wait.

1000640117.english: I really pushed her... I'm sure Muse wanted to say no...
1000640117.korean: 내가 막 몰아붙여서... 뮤즈는 분명 거절하고 싶었을텐데...

1000640118.english: Don't blame yourself too much. If you talk it over properly again, it will be okay.
1000640118.korean: 너무 자책하지마. 다시 잘 얘기해보면 괜찮을 거야.

1000640119.english: Yes~! It was a really lovely and cute performance!

1000640120.english: Please give a big round of applause to Mint Chocolate Shake, or Minchoshake for short!
1000640120.korean: 민트초코쉐이크, 줄여서 민초쉨에게 큰 박수 부탁드립니다!

1000640124.english: For now, let's focus on the stage. We've practiced so hard for this moment, haven't we?
1000640124.korean: 지금은 일단 무대에 집중하도록 하죠. 지금 이순간을 위해 열심히 연습했잖아요.

1000640126.english: Let's go. The event staff are coming to call us.
1000640126.korean: 가자. 진행 요원 애들이 부르러 오고 있어.

1000640128.english: What a wonderful song... The title was Song of a Lonely Star, wasn't it...
1000640128.korean: 정말 멋진 노래... 제목이 외로운 별의 노래 였지...

1000640129.english: I really want to sing this later...

1000640133.english: Sky Knights... said they learned it from Faucre.

1000640137.english: Neodym... Commander, she said she liked it when people sang to her...
1000640137.korean: 네오딤이... 사령관, 노래 불러주는 거 좋아한댔어...

1000640138.english: That's right. The boss really likes it when we sing for him.
1000640138.korean: 맞아요. 사장님은 저희가 노래 불러주는 거 좋아하세요.

1000640140.english: Then, shall we schedule an appointment for later? Emily, too, let's start with the basics—
1000640140.korean: 그럼 나중에 약속 잡을까요? 에밀리 양도 기본적인 것부터-

1000640145.english: As for that song... no, it's high-pitched and the atmosphere is...
1000640145.korean: 그 노래는요... 노, 높기도 하고 분위기가...

1000640149.english: Following the performance of Blooming Heart! Before watching the next stage, shall we take a moment for something special?
1000640149.korean: Blooming Heart의 무대에 이어서! 다음 무대를 보시기 전에, 잠시 특별한 시간을 가져볼까요?

1000640150.english: We can't miss this opportunity with everyone gathered like this. Now, I can speak!
1000640150.korean: 이렇게 다들 모인 기회를 놓칠 순 없겠죠. 이제는 말할 수 있다!

1000640152.english: Hello, I'm Brownie 2056 from the Direct Command Unit!

1000640153.english: What I want to say is...

1000640156.english: think I know where the muse is!
1000640156.korean: 나, 뮤즈 어딨는지 알 것 같아!

1000640157.english: - After the third song ended, it was finally time for the joint song by Muse and Sky Knights.
1000640157.korean: - 세 번째 곡까지 끝나고, 결국 뮤즈와 스카이나이츠의 합동곡 차례가 찾아오고 말았다.

1000640158.english: - I am barely buying time with a makeshift corner, but even that has its limits. Just as I was about to give up, Sleipnir suddenly burst in and shouted.
1000640158.korean: - 급조한 코너로 간신히 시간을 벌고는 있지만, 그것도 한계가 있다. 포기하려고 하고 있을 때, 갑자기 들이닥친 슬레이프니르가 소리쳤다.

1000640159.english: Last time, we went for a walk in the mountains on the east side of the big island, and Muse said she really liked it there.
1000640159.korean: 우리 저번에 큰 섬 동쪽에 있는 산에 산책갔었는데, 뮤즈가 그런 곳 마음에 든댔어.

1000640160.english: There's nowhere else to go! It must be there!
1000640160.korean: 달리 갈 데가 없잖아! 분명 거기 있을 거야!

1000640161.english: It is a sufficiently reachable distance from the estimated departure time until now, and it is highly likely that it could not be found by aerial reconnaissance due to the dense trees.
1000640161.korean: 예상 이탈 시간부터 지금까지 충분히 도달 가능한 거리이고, 나무가 울창해 항공 정찰로는 찾아내지 못했을 가능성이 높습니다.

1000640162.english: This is the area under the responsibility of Colonel Night Angel of the Doombringer. Order immediately-
1000640162.korean: 둠브링어의 나이트 앤젤 대령의 담당 구역입니다. 즉시 지시를-

1000640163.english: We'll go. No, we have to go.

1000640164.english: Muse didn't just run away because she didn't want to go on stage. Unless we're going to force her to come, we need to go and talk her into it.
1000640164.korean: 뮤즈는 단순히 무대에 오르기 싫어서 도망간 게 아니야. 강제로 데려올 게 아니라면 우리가 가서 설득해야해.

1000640165.english: Considering the round-trip time, preparation time for sortie, and the time to return and go on stage, there is at most 20 minutes of buffer time.
1000640165.korean: 왕복시간과 출격 준비 시간, 복귀해서 무대에 오르는 시간을 생각하면 길어야 20분의 여유가 있습니다.

1000640167.english: Because preparations for sortie are already complete.

1000640168.english: Leader, you just need to bring yourself.

1000640169.english: Sigh... In the end, I have to install the equipment here...

1000640170.english: Linti didn't want to sortie in this outfit...
1000640170.korean: 린티는 이 의상 입고 출격하고 싶진 않았는데...

1000640173.english: And the producer has work to do as well.
1000640173.korean: 그리고 프로듀서도 해줘야 할 일이 있어.

1000640174.english: - The griffon that entered the captain's quarters handed me something.
1000640174.korean: - 함장실로 들어온 그리폰이 내게 무언가를 건넸다.

1000640175.english: The "Now I Can Speak" corner will end soon.
1000640175.korean: 곧 이제는 말할 수 있다 코너가 끝날 거예요.

1000640176.english: They say Red Hood is running from the front lines to the Orca in a fit of rage.
1000640176.korean: 레드후드님이 잔뜩 화가 나서 전선에서 오르카호로 달려오고 있다고 해요.

1000640177.english: Ahaha, you know just by hearing that?

1000640178.english: Anyway... I think the producer will have to stall for time instead.
1000640178.korean: 어쨌든... 프로듀서가 대신 시간을 끌어줘야 할 것 같아.

1000640179.english: - For some reason, Harpyia blushed as she spoke, and I looked down at the microphone in my hand.
1000640179.korean: - 왜인지 얼굴을 붉히는 하르페이아의 말에 손에 들린 마이크를 내려다 보았다.

1000640181.english: If the song isn't quite right, it's okay to dance.
1000640181.korean: 노래가 좀 그러면 춤을 춰도 괜찮아.

1000640182.english: Actually, you can just talk casually, though.
1000640182.korean: 사실 그냥 적당히 이야기만 하셔도 되지만요.

1000640183.english: Let's hurry up. We don't have time.

1000640184.english: - I guess there's no other choice...

1000640185.english: - I left the stage coordination to Alpha and followed the Sky Knights out of the captain's quarters.
1000640185.korean: - 무대 조율을 알파에게 맡기고, 스카이나이츠를 따라 함장실을 나섰다.

1000640187.english: Uh, uh...?! Is this for real...? This can't be...
1000640187.korean: 어, 어...?! 이거 진짠가...? 말도 안돼...

1000640188.english: Hey everyone! Here is breaking news!

1000640189.english: A completely unexpected special stage! It is...!
1000640189.korean: 전혀 예정에 없던 특별 무대! 바로...!

1000640191.english: - A roar strong enough to make the Orca ship vibrate erupted from the audience, which had been silent for a few seconds at Spriggan's shout.
1000640191.korean: - 스프리건의 외침에 몇 초간 고요해졌던 객석에서 오르카 호가 진동할 정도의 함성이 터져나왔다.

1000640192.english: - Hesitantly, I stepped onto the stage and caught my breath.

1000640193.english: - Beyond the audience seats, I saw six engine flames flying across the sky.
1000640193.korean: - 관객석 너머로, 여섯 개의 엔진 화염이 하늘을 가로질러 날아가는 것이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000640194.english: - Wishing myself good luck, I looked at the packed audience.
1000640194.korean: - 속으로 행운을 빌어주며, 꽉 들어찬 관객석을 바라보았다.

1000640197.english: To the squad under Momo5. I've found the Muse! Coordinates 5, 2, Sierra, Charlie—
1000640197.korean: 모모5에서 휘하 편대에게. 뮤즈를 찾았어! 좌표는 5, 2, 시에라, 찰리-

1000640200.english: Please wait 1km away from that point until I signal. That's all.
1000640200.korean: 신호할 때까지 해당 지점 1km 바깥에서 기다려줘. 이상.

1000640201.english: ...So you were here? I've been looking for you for a long time!

1000640202.english: Alright, let's go. The producer is stalling, so if we hurry, we won't be late.
1000640202.korean: 자, 어서 가자. 프로듀서가 시간 끌고 있으니까, 서두르면 늦지 않을거야.

1000640206.english: I... I don't think I can go...

1000640209.english: I, I'm sorry. I was in a hurry without realizing it...
1000640209.korean: 미, 미안. 나도 모르게 마음이 급해서...

1000640210.english: Anyway, let's hurry. We promised to sing together.
1000640210.korean: 어쨌든 빨리 가자. 우리 같이 노래부르기로 약속했잖아.

1000640211.english: ......I'm sorry, I don't think I can keep that promise.
1000640211.korean: ......죄송해요, 그 약속... 못 지킬 것 같아요.

1000640213.english: Can you tell me the reason?

1000640214.english: Even if I say it... nothing changes.

1000640215.english: ...You're right. No matter what's bothering Muse, unless it involves smashing those Iron Beasts to pieces, I don't have the ability to help her.
1000640215.korean: ...맞아. 뮤즈가 어떤 고민을 하고 있든, 철충 녀석들을 때려부수는 게 아니라면 나는 해결해 줄 능력이 없어.

1000640219.english: Still... I can at least listen to you...
1000640219.korean: 그래도... 이야기 정도는 들어줄 수 있다구...

1000640223.english: Of course we're friends! We've hung out together so many times!
1000640223.korean: 당연히 친구지! 몇 번이나 같이 놀았잖아!

1000640226.english: Standing on stage... and seeing the audience's reaction...
1000640226.korean: 무대에 서는 것도... 관객들의 반응을 보는 것도...

1000640227.english: I was super nervous the first time I went on stage, too. Everyone does that.
1000640227.korean: 나도 처음 무대에 오를 땐 엄청 떨렸어. 그건 누구나 그래.

1000640228.english: No, that is not the case.

1000640229.english: It's not just that I'm nervous... I'm scared.

1000640232.english: Going up on stage to sing, and facing the audience...
1000640232.korean: 무대에 올라 노래하는 것도, 관객 분들과 마주하는 것도...

1000640234.english: You said you wanted to sing songs that convey sincerity! At this rate—
1000640234.korean: 진심을 전하는 노래를 하고 싶다며! 이래서는-

1000640236.english: If my sincerity... is denied by someone else...
1000640236.korean: 제 진심이... 다른 누군가에 의해 부정당한다면...

1000640240.english: To think I want to go on stage and sing, yet am afraid of letting others hear my singing...
1000640240.korean: 무대에 올라 노래하고 싶으면서도, 노래를 들려주는 건 무서워하다니...

1000640242.english: There's more. This one... is really childish compared to the previous reason, though.
1000640242.korean: 또 있어요. 이건... 앞에 이유에 비하면 정말 유치하지만요.

1000640245.english: You said you fell in love with the producer at first sight, right?

1000640248.english: I see a producer who treats even a woman like me kindly and takes an interest in me.
1000640248.korean: 저같은 여자에게도 다정하게 대해주시고, 관심을 가져주시는 프로듀서를 보고요.

1000640249.english: However, the closer I got to the Sky Knights... the more insignificant I felt.
1000640249.korean: 그런데 스카이나이츠 여러분과 친해질수록... 저 스스로가 정말 초라해졌어요.

1000640250.english: Not only am I bright normally, but I shine so brightly when I sing... There’s no way a producer would take an interest in someone as gloomy as me.
1000640250.korean: 평소에는 물론이고, 노래할 때 저렇게나 반짝반짝 빛나는데... 음침한 저에게 프로듀서가 관심을 줄 리가 없으니까요.

1000640251.english: And when I see the strong bond between the producers and you all, and among yourselves...
1000640251.korean: 그리고 프로듀서와 여러분, 또 여러분들 간의 그 끈끈한 유대감을 볼때도...

1000640252.english: "I guess there's no place for me to butt in," I thought—Ouch?!
1000640252.korean: 제가 끼어들 자리는 없구나, 하고- 아얏?!

1000640255.english: I told you we were friends! Plus, you're an honorary Sky Knights member!
1000640255.korean: 친구라고 했잖아! 거기다 명예 스카이나이츠 대원이라고, 너는!

1000640257.english: Of course I'm serious! What on earth are you talking about!
1000640257.korean: 진심인게 당연하잖아! 대체 무슨 말을 하는 거야!

1000640260.english: And there's something that makes me even angrier.

1000640261.english: Muse, you like the producer, right?

1000640263.english: Did you tell the producer you like him?

1000640267.english: Say it. Say you like me.

1000640269.english: Do you perhaps not genuinely like me?

1000640274.english: As the Squad Leader of the Sky Knights and the leader of an idol group, I guarantee it.
1000640274.korean: 스카이나이츠의 전대장이자, 아이돌 그룹의 리더로서 보증할게.

1000640275.english: The producer never betrays our sincerity.
1000640275.korean: 프로듀서는 절대로 우리의 진심을 배신하지 않아.

1000640279.english: Yeah. It's a bidirectional comms drone the producer uses to supervise on-site.
1000640279.korean: 응. 프로듀서가 현장 보면서 지휘할때 쓰는 쌍방 통신용 드론이야.

1000640282.english: - Just when there was no more way to stall for time, a video call came in for Sleipnir.
1000640282.korean: - 더이상 시간을 끌만한 방법이 사라졌을때쯤, 슬레이프니르에게 화상 통신이 들어왔다.

1000640283.english: - Behind Sleipnir, who nodded, stood Muse, looking completely unsure what to do.
1000640283.korean: - 고개를 끄덕인 슬레이프니르 뒤에 어쩔 줄 모르며 서있는 뮤즈의 모습이 눈에 들어왔다.

1000640285.english: The producer—apparently, the muse really likes him.

1000640287.english: - What context could have led to that statement?
1000640287.korean: - 대체 어떤 맥락에서 이런 말이 나온거지?

1000640290.english: She says she really, truly, seriously likes you.

1000640291.english: - Leaving the stalling duty to Spriggan again, I headed to the backstage waiting room.
1000640291.korean: - 시간 끌기 역할을 다시 스프리건에게 맡기고, 무대 뒷편 대기실로 향했다.

1000640292.english: - As Sleipnir finished her brief... well, blunt explanation of the situation, Muse hung her head as if she had given up on everything.
1000640292.korean: - 슬레이프니르의 간단하고... 음, 적나라한 상황 설명이 끝나자 뮤즈는 모든걸 포기한 듯 고개를 떨궜다.

1000640293.english: - I felt a little sorry for Muse, but only then could I finally relax. This was something I could handle.
1000640293.korean: - 뮤즈에겐 조금 미안하지만, 그제서야 안심할 수 있었다. 이건 내가 해결할 수 있는 문제니까.

1000640294.english: - It might be a bit forceful, but a good idea came to mind. Yeah, if it's Muse, then…
1000640294.korean: - 조금 과격할지 몰라도, 좋은 생각이 떠올랐다. 그래, 분명 뮤즈라면...

1000640295.english: - Holding the panel, I approached Yumi, who was acting as tech director, and called out to Muse beyond the screen.
1000640295.korean: - 패널을 들고 기술 감독을 맡고 있는 유미에게 향하며, 화면 너머의 뮤즈를 불렀다.

1000640297.english: No… It's because I'm just so pathetic…

1000640302.english: - Sleipnir, who had been listening quietly to what I was saying, looked as if she wanted to object, but commendably, she didn’t interrupt.
1000640302.korean: - 내 말에 가만히 듣고 있던 슬레이프니르가 뭔가 항의하고 싶은 표정을 지었지만, 기특하게도 끼어들지는 않았다.

1000640305.english: - When I brought up what I heard last time when I visited Muse's room, Muse's trembling body gradually calmed down.
1000640305.korean: - 저번에 뮤즈의 방에 찾아갔을 때 들었던 말을 꺼내자, 계속해서 떨리던 뮤즈의 몸이 차츰 안정되어갔다.

1000640306.english: It's unfinished... so it might sound a little strange.

1000640307.english: The lyrics are just a sketch...

1000640309.english: - Muse, who had been smiling faintly at my silly remark, looked up.
1000640309.korean: - 내 실없는 말에 작게 미소지은 뮤즈가 고개를 들었다.

1000640313.english: - The intro played, and Muse started singing against a backdrop of a star-filled night sky.
1000640313.korean: - 전주가 흐르고, 별이 가득한 밤하늘을 배경으로 뮤즈가 노래하기 시작했다.

1000640314.english: - A faintly trembling voice. Listening to that voice, I met eyes with Muse shining in the starlight.
1000640314.korean: - 가늘게 떨리는 목소리. 그런 목소리를 들으며, 별빛을 받아 빛나는 뮤즈와 눈을 맞췄다.

1000640315.english: - As if trying to suppress a tremor, Muse placed one hand over her chest and slowly reached out to me with the other.
1000640315.korean: - 떨림을 억누르려는 듯 한 손을 가슴팍에 얹은 뮤즈가 다른 한 손을 천천히 내게 뻗었다.

1000640316.english: - Though I couldn’t take her hand, I gave her a slight nod.
1000640316.korean: - 비록 그 손을 잡아줄수는 없지만, 작게 고개를 끄덕여 주었다.

1000640317.english: - That alone seemed enough, as Muse's tone was filled with light.
1000640317.korean: - 그것만으로도 충분했는지 뮤즈의 음색에 빛이 깃들었다.

1000640318.english: - Is this what it means to sing with all your heart?
1000640318.korean: - 온 마음을 다해 노래한다는 게 이런걸까.

1000640319.english: - Her expressions, gestures, and voices that come through the screen.
1000640319.korean: - 화면 너머로 전해지는 표정, 몸짓, 목소리.

1000640321.english: - After the first verse came the bridge, then the chorus.

1000640322.english: - Muse's clear, transparent voice, filled with countless emotions, filled the stage.
1000640322.korean: - 수많은 감정을 담은 뮤즈의 맑고 투명한 목소리가 무대를 가득 채운다.

1000640323.english: - A forest under a night sky that seemed ready to shower stars.
1000640323.korean: - 별이 쏟아질 것 같은 밤하늘 아래의 숲.

1000640324.english: - And the stage where I stood.

1000640325.english: - With the final lyrics, Muse's sincerity unquestionably reached this place.
1000640325.korean: - 마지막 가사와 함께, 뮤즈의 진심은 틀림없이 이곳까지 전해졌다.

1000640327.english: - Even after the song ended, Muse looked at me with eyes glistening with tears.
1000640327.korean: - 노래가 끝나고 나서도, 뮤즈는 살짝 눈물이 고인 눈으로 나를 바라보고 있다.

1000640328.english: - Receiving that gaze full of emotions that words couldn't express, I quietly waited until Muse spoke first.
1000640328.korean: - 그런 말로는 다 전할 수 없는 감정이 담긴 눈빛을 받으며, 뮤즈가 먼저 입을 열 때까지 가만히 기다리고 있었다.

1000640331.english: And that... you mean it, right...?

1000640333.english: - Muse's expression, which had been smiling shyly at my question, hardened.
1000640333.korean: - 내 물음에 수줍게 미소짓던 뮤즈의 표정이 굳었다.

1000640334.english: Singing in front of an audience is still...

1000640336.english: - Seeing the puzzled Muse, I turned around, still holding the communication panel.
1000640336.korean: - 의아해하는 뮤즈를 보며, 통신용 패널을 든 채로 뒤로 돌았다.

1000640337.english: - Muse's eyes widened, and at the same time, cheers shook the night sky.
1000640337.korean: - 뮤즈의 눈동자가 커지고, 동시에 환호 소리가 밤하늘을 흔들었다.

1000640341.english: It was a surprise performance by the genius singer-songwriter Muse!
1000640341.korean: 천재 싱어송라이터 뮤즈 양의 서프라이즈 무대였습니다!

1000640342.english: That's amazing! I can't believe a song can be this emotional!
1000640342.korean: 정말 대단합니다! 이렇게 감정이 느껴지는 노래라니!

1000640343.english: It looks like it will become popular after the performance ends! It will be registered in karaoke right away, right?
1000640343.korean: 공연이 끝난 뒤에 유행하겠네요! 노래방에 등록은 바로 되는 거겠죠!

1000640344.english: - I turned off the sync feature I had turned on just before Muse started singing, then cracked a joke at Muse, who was staring blankly.
1000640344.korean: - 뮤즈가 노래를 시작하기 직전에 켰던 동기화 기능을 다시 끄고, 멍한 표정을 짓고 있는 뮤즈에게 농담을 던졌다.

1000640351.english: fell in love at first sight...

1000640360.english: Yeah... I teared up a little too.

1000640361.english: If I asked the producer for something like this...

1000640362.english: Linti was a little bit nervous, too...

1000640364.english: You said the producer would never betray you!

1000640365.english: How great would it be if they always said such cool things...
1000640365.korean: 맨날 저렇게 멋있는 말만 하면 얼마나 좋아...

1000640366.english: Sometimes acting quirky is also one of the charms of a producer.
1000640366.korean: 가끔 엉뚱한 행동을 하는 것도 프로듀서의 매력 중 하나입니다.

1000640367.english: In technical terms, it's called gap moe.

1000640369.english: Still, let's head back before the producer shows off more of his unexpected charm on stage.
1000640369.korean: 그래도 프로듀서가 무대에서 반전매력을 더 보여주기 전에 어서 돌아가자.

1000640370.english: I got a message saying there's nothing left to do anymore, whether it's singing or anything else.
1000640370.korean: 노래고 뭐고 더이상 할 게 없다고 메세지 왔어.

1000640371.english: Muse, are you going to be okay?

1000640373.english: Great! For the final stage, the seven of us Sky Knights are going to put on a spectacular show!
1000640373.korean: 좋았어! 마지막 무대, 우리 스카이나이츠 일곱 명이서 멋지게 장식하는 거야!

1000640377.english: Will I have time to go back and fix my makeup and hair?
1000640377.korean: 돌아가서 화장이랑 머리 다시 세팅할 시간 있을까?

1000640380.english: - It was quite a while after the Sky Knights and Muse organized their flight equipment, put on makeup, and fixed their hair before they could go on stage.
1000640380.korean: - 스카이나이츠와 뮤즈는 비행장비 정리한다, 화장하고 머리 고친다 한참이나 지나서야 무대에 오를 수 있었다.

1000640381.english: - Dragging my battered body, I went down to the audience seats as if taking turns with the Sky Knights who were taking the stage one by one, and I made eye contact with Muse, who was the last to come up.
1000640381.korean: - 만신창이가 된 몸을 이끌고 차례차례 무대에 오르는 스카이나이츠와 교대하듯 객석으로 내려가다, 마지막으로 올라오는 뮤즈와 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000640382.english: - Seeing a bright smile I had never seen before, I sat down in the audience seat with a sense of relief.
1000640382.korean: - 전에는 볼 수 없었던 환한 미소에, 나는 안심하고 객석에 앉았다.

1000640383.english: - Whether it is because of the previous stage or because their spirits are high, the Sky Knights, excluding Muse, are enjoying the stage with ease.
1000640383.korean: - 앞의 무대를 겪은 덕분인지, 기분이 고양된 때문인지. 뮤즈를 제외한 스카이나이츠는 여유있게 무대를 즐기고 있다.

1000640384.english: - I made eye contact with Sleipnir, who was actively engaging with the audience and encouraging their response even during parts that weren’t her.
1000640384.korean: - 자신의 파트가 아닌 부분에서도 적극적으로 관객들과 호흡하며 호응을 유도하는 슬레이프니르와 눈이 마주쳤다.

1000640385.english: Producer! It's my part soon, so listen carefully!
1000640385.korean: 프로듀서! 곧 내 파트니까 잘 들어줘!

1000640386.english: I originally intended to sing while looking at Momo, but...

1000640387.english: Right now, my heart is filled only with producers.
1000640387.korean: 지금 제 마음 속엔, 프로듀서만이 가득하군요.

1000640389.english: Muse, it's okay! Everyone is cheering for you!

1000640391.english: - A smile spread across my face as I watched the members singing with big smiles.
1000640391.korean: - 활짝 웃으며 노래하는 대원들의 모습에 내 입가에도 미소가 번졌다.

1000640394.english: So Blacky was secretly enjoying it too?

1000640395.english: Yeah. Because I don't think I'll ever be able to have an experience like this again.
1000640395.korean: 응. 이런 경험, 다시는 못 할 것 같으니까.

1000640396.english: - Looking back, it was something I started on the spot.

1000640397.english: - I just wanted to do something for the team members, and then I remembered Sleipnir saying she wanted to debut as an idol...
1000640397.korean: - 그냥 대원들에게 무언가를 해주고 싶었고, 그러다 슬레이프니르가 아이돌 데뷔를 하고 싶다고 한 말이 떠올랐고...

1000640398.english: It looks like the producer is thinking about something else.

1000640399.english: Excuse me~ Please focus on cute Linty~!

1000640400.english: Producer~ Oh, he waved at me!

1000640402.english: - And then, without any plan, I barged into the Sky Knights' dorm and told them they should become idols.
1000640402.korean: - 그리고나선 아무런 대책도 없이 스카이나이츠의 숙소에 쳐들어가서, 아이돌을 하자고 했었지.

1000640403.english: - ......Makes me think of that cooking contest from years ago. Maybe humans aren't creatures that grow after all.
1000640403.korean: - ......몇 년 전의 요리 대회가 떠오른다. 혹시 인간은 성장하지 않는 생물이 아닐까.

1000640406.english: To be able to sing on a stage like this...
1000640406.korean: 이런 무대에서... 노래할 수 있게 되다니...

1000640407.english: Oh dear. It's too soon to be so moved.

1000640408.english: We still have to promote the 2nd and 3rd albums.

1000640409.english: - Still, after looking up all sorts of materials and getting help from the other members, we finally made it to this wonderful stage.
1000640409.korean: - 그래도 이것저것 자료를 찾아보고, 다른 대원들의 도움을 받으면서 이런 멋진 무대까지 도착했다.

1000640410.english: - It's a shame we couldn't watch the previous stage live... but that's what you get.
1000640410.korean: - 앞선 무대를 라이브로 보지 못한 건 아쉽지만... 그건 자업자득이지.

1000640412.english: - The familiar voice woke me up from the thoughts I was lost in while watching the stage.
1000640412.korean: - 무대를 보면서도 상념에 잠겨 있던 나를, 익숙한 목소리가 깨웠다.

1000640414.english: What have you been thinking about all this time?

1000640415.english: I could totally see you weren't paying attention to Linty~
1000640415.korean: 린티에게 집중하지 못하시는 거 딱 보였다구요~

1000640416.english: That's right. I was a bit upset too.

1000640418.english: That's right! Because we're idols just for the producers!

1000640419.english: Leader, didn't you say last time that idols are for everyone?
1000640419.korean: 리더, 저번에는 아이돌은 모두를 위한 존재라고 하지 않았어?

1000640420.english: Well, that's how it is right now!

1000640421.english: Since I'm a guest and not a full-fledged idol, I'll be a singer just for the producer.
1000640421.korean: 저는 객원이라 정식 아이돌은 아니니까, 프로듀서만을 위한 가수가 될게요.

1000640422.english: What? Muse, I didn't know you could be so assertive!
1000640422.korean: 뭐야. 뮤즈 너, 그렇게 적극적인 말도 할 줄 알았어?

1000640423.english: Uh... I, I don't know what to say... I, I'm just so excited...!
1000640423.korean: 엣... 제, 제가 무슨 말을... 기, 기분이 너무 들떠서요...!

1000640424.english: - The Sky Knights and the Muses are looking only at me from the vast audience.
1000640424.korean: - 스카이나이츠와 뮤즈는 넓은 관객석 중에서 오직 나만을 바라보고 있다.

1000640425.english: - I couldn't quite make out what they were saying, but I could tell just by looking at their facial expressions and body language.
1000640425.korean: - 무슨 말을 하는지 잘 들리지는 않지만, 표정과 몸짓만 봐도 알 것 같았다.

1000640426.english: Producer! Thank you! I love you!

1000640427.english: We'll always be idols just for the producers!
1000640427.korean: 우리는 앞으로도 쭉, 프로듀서만을 위한 아이돌이야!

1000640428.english: - A seven-colored smile that shines like the stars.

1000640429.english: - The moment I saw it, I realized.

1000640430.english: - Whether we hold a cooking competition or an end-of-year party...
1000640430.korean: - 요리 대회를 열든, 연말 파티를 하든...

1000640431.english: - Whether you go on vacation to the beach or hold a New Year's event.
1000640431.korean: - 바닷가로 휴가를 가든, 새해 행사를 열든.

1000640432.english: - ... Okay. All I ask of my team members is this smile.
1000640432.korean: - ...그래. 내가 대원들에게 바라는 건, 이 미소 뿐이다.

1000640433.english: - The moment that thought crossed my mind, something welled up inside my chest.
1000640433.korean: - 그런 생각이 든 순간, 가슴 속에서 무언가 북받쳤다.

1000640434.english: - I put that feeling into words and shouted with all my might, so it wouldn't be drowned out by the cheers of the other members.
1000640434.korean: - 그 감정을 문장으로 만들어, 다른 대원들의 환호 소리에 묻히지 않도록 힘껏 외쳤다.

1000640435.english: < Project ORCA, Starry Night Stage > END.

1000640436.english: Did you see how perfectly the choreography matched? They must have practiced a lot.
1000640436.korean: 안무 딱딱 맞는 거 봤어? 엄청 연습했을거야.

1000640437.english: Yeah. Every time I ran into him at the launch pad, he looked really tired.
1000640437.korean: 응. 출격 포트에서 마주칠 때마다 엄청 피곤해 보였어.

1000640439.english: Still, both when singing and at the end, you looked really happy.
1000640439.korean: 그래도 노래 할때도 그렇고, 마지막에 정말 기뻐보였어.

1000640442.english: Are you done with the kitchen work?

1000640443.english: Yeah. The chef wants to go out and play now.

1000640445.english: Oh, hi Mina too. I've heard a lot about you from Tiamat.
1000640445.korean: 아, 미나도 안녕. 티아멧한테 얘기 많이 들었어.

1000640446.english: Um... I've been learning how to make desserts lately...
1000640446.korean: 그... 요새 디저트 만드는 걸 배우고 있어서...

1000640448.english: You're always busy with sorties and training.

1000640449.english: Just occasionally whenever I have time...

1000640450.english: You even got kicked out by the head chef for coming looking for me right after returning from a sortie, right?
1000640450.korean: 출격 나갔다가 돌아와서 바로 찾아오는 바람에 주방장님한테 쫓겨나기도 했었지?

1000640452.english: She’s actually a nice guy once you get to know her.

1000640454.english: Joe, I was going to tell you when I got a little better.
1000640454.korean: 조, 좀 더 잘하게 되면 말하려고 했어.

1000640455.english: As expected, it's hard to talk to others if you're clumsy.
1000640455.korean: 역시 서툴면 다른 사람한테 이야기하기 힘들지.

1000640456.english: That's why I rarely talk about learning to cook, either...
1000640456.korean: 나도 그래서 요리 배우는 거 웬만해선 말 안해...

1000640458.english: I thought you would be good at cooking too since you make desserts well.
1000640458.korean: 디저트 잘 만드니까 요리도 잘 할 줄 알았는데.

1000640459.english: Because I had never done it before...

1000640460.english: The other day, I made some seaweed soup and had the head chef taste it. After she took a bite, she was silent for a while...
1000640460.korean: 저번에 미역국 끓여서 주방장님한테 평가 받았는데, 맛을 보시고 한동안 말이 없으시더니...

1000640461.english: It would be best to aim for the birthday five years from now.
1000640461.korean: "5년 뒤의 탄신일을 목표로 하는 게 좋겠사옵니다."

1000640463.english: Ah, are you planning to cook for the Commander?

1000640464.english: Yeah. The chef is great at making desserts, so she can take care of the whole meal from start to finish, but I can't. That's why.
1000640464.korean: 응. 주방장님은 디저트도 잘 하시니까 식사 처음부터 끝까지 대접할 수 있는데, 나는 아니잖아. 그래서.

1000640465.english: It seems like everyone is doing what they want to do these days...
1000640465.korean: 요새 다들 하고 싶은 일 많이 하는구나...

1000640467.english: I, I'm sorry... I really was about to tell you.
1000640467.korean: 미, 미안... 진짜로 금방 말하려고 했어.

1000640468.english: But what are you both going to do now?
1000640468.korean: 근데 둘 다 이제 뭐 할거야?

1000640469.english: I was planning to go to karaoke.

1000640470.english: Wouldn't the karaoke room already be full? I think it would be better to just watch the talent show here.
1000640470.korean: 노래방 이미 꽉 차지 않았을까? 그냥 여기서 장기자랑이나 보는게 나을 것 같아.

1000640471.english: That's fine. Azaz over there temporarily made it quite big.
1000640471.korean: 그건 괜찮아. 저쪽에 아자즈 님이 임시로 꽤 크게 만들었어.

1000640473.english: Yeah. Still, if you go late, there might not be any seats— Ah.
1000640473.korean: 응. 그래도 늦게 가면 자리 없을지도- 앗.

1000640475.english: Yeah. I watched it while handing out snacks.

1000640476.english: Thank you for your hard work, Commander!

1000640478.english: Were the songs just registered in the karaoke?
1000640478.korean: 좀 전에 노래들, 노래방에 등록 됐어요?

1000640480.english: I wonder how long it's been since a new song came out...

1000640481.english: Come to think of it, that's true. We've only consumed what was left over until now.
1000640481.korean: 그러고보니 그렇네. 우리는 지금까지 남겨져 있던 것만 소비했으니까.

1000640482.english: Uh, it's because I hear it a lot because of Emily...

1000640484.english: We're going to karaoke, Commander... want to go too? Do you want to come along?
1000640484.korean: 우리 노래방 갈 건데 사령관도... 가, 같이 갈래?

1000640489.english: Why didn't you tell me about this again!
1000640489.korean: 너 이건 또 왜 말 안했어!

1000640490.english: Reveal all your remaining secrets today!

1000640491.english: I-I'm not here anymore. I-I'm too embarrassed to say I'm a maid...
1000640491.korean: 이, 이제 없어. 메, 메이드는 말하기 부끄러워서...

1000640493.english: Tiamat, doesn't it look like you've gotten much brighter?
1000640493.korean: 티아멧, 많이 밝아진 것 같지 않아?

1000640496.english: Okay, I'm off now. See you later.

1000640497.english: - Aurora placed a candy in my hand and stepped in between Tiamat and Mina, who were still bickering.
1000640497.korean: - 아우로라는 내 손에 사탕하나를 쥐어주곤, 아직도 티격태격하고 있는 티아멧과 미나 사이에 끼어들었다.

1000640498.english: - Leaving behind the deck of the Orca, where singing could be heard from here and there, I headed toward the captain's quarters.
1000640498.korean: - 이곳저곳에서 노랫소리가 들리는 오르카 호의 갑판을 뒤로하고 함장실로 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1000640501.english: Ugh... Maybe it's because the tension has finally released, but I have no strength in my whole body.
1000640501.korean: 으으... 긴장이 풀려서 그런가, 온 몸에 힘이 없어.

1000640502.english: Hehe, Linti could probably do this every single day.
1000640502.korean: 에헷, 린티는 매일매일도 할 수 있겠는데?

1000640503.english: That cheering, and the producer who told me I was the best...

1000640507.english: Anyway, they said they'd come as soon as they were done tidying up, so let's wash up and rest a bit.
1000640507.korean: 그래도 정리되는 대로 오신다고 했으니까, 씻고 좀 쉬고 있자.

1000640508.english: ...... In the end, you only got to perform one song, right?

1000640510.english: I'm still left with some regrets. This kind of thing doesn't suit my temperament!
1000640510.korean: 역시 아쉬움이 남아. 이런 건 내 성미에 안맞는다구!

1000640511.english: Hey guys, just wait a moment!

1000640513.english: That level of SPD is truly admirable.

1000640514.english: P-Producer-san, are you going to the producer...?

1000640516.english: Surely they won't force me to come...

1000640519.english: - While I was finishing up my work in the captain's cabin, I suddenly realized I was already in the Sky Knights' quarters.
1000640519.korean: - 함장실에서 업무를 정리하던 나는, 정신을 차려보니 어느새 스카이나이츠의 숙소에 와있었다.

1000640520.english: Wow, since you're here, I guess there's no choice.

1000640521.english: Producer! The stage you haven't seen, I'll show it to you here.
1000640521.korean: 프로듀서! 못 보신 무대, 여기서 보여드릴게요.

1000640522.english: - Come to think of it, I saw the ending song with Muse, but I haven't really seen the other songs properly.
1000640522.korean: - 그러고보니 뮤즈와 함께한 엔딩곡은 봤지만, 다른 곡들은 제대로 보질 못했다.

1000640523.english: - I hadn't even heard the full song during practice...

1000640524.english: The producer is only a producer until today, right?

1000640525.english: So, please watch until the very end.

1000640527.english: Hey guys! Let's get ready quickly!

1000640528.english: Let's move the table to the corner.

1000640530.english: I'll bring the amplifier. Being in the practice room is fine, right?
1000640530.korean: 저는 앰프를 가져오겠습니다. 연습실에 있는 거면 되겠죠.

1000640532.english: I'll set up the position on the floor!

1000640534.english: Wow, the roles were assigned in an instant...

1000640536.english: - Muse muttered something under her breath as if she had come to some realization, then spoke up with a look of concern.
1000640536.korean: - 뭔가 납득한듯 작게 중얼거린 뮤즈가 걱정스럽게 입을 열었다.

1000640537.english: But, by any chance... Won't it be too noisy...?

1000640538.english: - At this time... The unit talent show must be in full swing on stage right now.
1000640538.korean: - 지금 시간이면... 무대에서는 한창 부대별 장기자랑을 하고 있겠군.

1000640539.english: - On deck, there's a temporary karaoke, and inside the ship, there are probably many places where crew members who get along are gathering and having fun...
1000640539.korean: - 갑판에는 임시 노래방에, 함내에서도 마음 맞는 대원들끼리 모여서 놀고 있는 곳도 많을테고...

1000640542.english: - The Muse, who had called out to me in a small voice and then blushed for a while, cautiously linked arms with me.
1000640542.korean: - 기어들어가는 목소리로 나를 부르곤 한동안 얼굴을 붉힌채 있던 뮤즈가 조심스럽게 내게 팔짱을 꼈다.

1000640544.english: I've really wanted to try this...

1000640547.english: What...? There's no part for me in this song...
1000640547.korean: 네...? 이 곡은 제 파트가 없는데...

1000640549.english: There's no solo part, but you can sing the group parts together and do the choreography.
1000640549.korean: 단독 파트는 없지만, 단체 파트를 같이 부르면서 안무하시면 됩니다.

1000640550.english: Oh, I don't even know the choreography...?!

1000640551.english: Just follow along and be observant!

1000640552.english: Producer, don't take your eyes off it. Got it?
1000640552.korean: 프로듀서, 눈 떼면 안 돼. 알았지?

1000640553.english: - No dazzling stage effects, no cheering audience... A small performance held in the dorm where they can't even practice the choreography properly.
1000640553.korean: - 화려한 무대 효과도, 환호하는 관객도 없는... 안무도 제대로 할 수 없는 숙소에서 펼치는 작은 공연.

1000640554.english: - Of course, the songs they prepared this time were performed, but they also sang other songs in between, and the performance continued until late into the Night.
1000640554.korean: - 이번에 준비한 곡은 물론, 중간중간 다른 노래들도 부르며 공연은 밤이 깊을 때까지 이어졌다.

1000640555.english: - As one easy-to-understand song filled with affection followed another, I felt the bond between the members and me deepen with each song.
1000640555.korean: - 알기 쉬운 애정이 담긴 노래가 한 곡, 또 한 곡 이어질 때마다 나를 향한 대원들의, 그리고 대원들을 향한 내 감정이 더욱 깊어져 가는 것이 느껴졌다.

1000640556.english: - Finally, after singing the ending song they performed on stage last, Sleipnir, who had been repeating "I love you, I like you" while nestled in my arms, gently pushed against my chest.
1000640556.korean: - 마지막으로 무대에서 보여줬던 엔딩곡까지 부른 뒤, 품에 안겨 사랑해, 좋아해를 연발하던 슬레이프니르가 내 가슴팍을 살며시 밀었다.

1000640557.english: - ... Well, I was planning to stay here tonight anyway.

1000640558.english: - I surrendered myself to her touch and collapsed onto the bed, then brushed aside the strands of hair that had fallen across Sleipnir’s flushed face as she looked down at me.
1000640558.korean: - 그 손길에 몸을 맡기고 침대로 쓰러지며, 상기된 얼굴로 나를 내려다보는 슬레이프니르의 흘러내린 머리카락을 쓸어넘겨 주었다.

1000640561.english: The shower room is empty. Even if you go to wash up... Oh.

1000640564.english: ...... Ventilation, a little... What I'm doing is...

1000640567.english: Yes, yes... I went out and came back, and then... boom!

1000640568.english: I wasn't thinking about that. I'm glad Muse told me.
1000640568.korean: 생각을 못 하고 있었네. 뮤즈가 말해줘서 다행이야.

1000640569.english: Since we're not diving today, it should be fine to use external intake.
1000640569.korean: 오늘은 잠항 예정 없으니까, 외부 유입으로 해도 될 거야.

1000640571.english: Okay, never mind... Now it's this one.

1000640573.english: Get up, you idiot Squad Leader! Do you want to go to sleep like that?
1000640573.korean: 일어나, 이 바보 전대장아! 그 꼴로 그냥 자고 싶어?

1000640574.english: Uh, Producer... That's... nooo... You're being too forward...
1000640574.korean: 으응, 프로듀서어... 그건, 안돼애... 너무 적극적이자나아...

1000640576.english: Just let them have their fun~ They were the most eager to jump in, but they ended up being the first to fall.
1000640576.korean: 즐기시게 둬~ 제일 의욕적으로 덤벼들었다가 결국 제일 먼저 쓰러졌잖아.

1000640577.english: Even if it didn't seem like it, you were on edge the whole time, looking out for us... You must have been really tired.
1000640577.korean: 아닌 것 같아도 우리 챙기느라 내내 긴장하고 있었으니까... 많이 피곤했을 거야.

1000640578.english: Oh dear... But how do I wash this thing?

1000640579.english: Rock, paper, scissors, and the two who lose have to carry it?
1000640579.korean: 가위바위보 해서 진 두명이 들고 가기?

1000640580.english: Rock, paper, scissors, if you don't play, you lose!

1000640583.english: I'll pack the toiletries, Squad Leader.

1000640585.english: You guys go wash up too.

1000640586.english: I guess I shouldn't use it on my hair next time...

1000640588.english: Huh? You've already finished tidying up?

1000640589.english: Okay. I've tidied up and ventilated the place, so please just wash the sheets and blankets.
1000640589.korean: 어. 정리하고 환기는 해놨으니까, 시트랑 이불만 좀 빨아줘.

1000640590.english: Everyone is off today, so let's wrap everything up in the morning and get some rest.
1000640590.korean: 오늘은 전원 비번이니, 오전에 전부 마무리하고 쉬도록 하죠.

1000640591.english: I will gather the clothes and wash them as well.

1000640592.english: But did the producer go back exactly as he was earlier?

1000640593.english: You looked half-asleep when we woke up and went to wash up...
1000640593.korean: 우리 일어나서 씻으러 갈 때 비몽사몽해 보이던데...

1000640596.english: Griffon grabbed the producer’s collar as he was about to leave and looked straight up at him...
1000640596.korean: 그리폰이 돌아가려는 프로듀서 옷깃을 붙잡고 딱 올려다보면서...

1000640597.english: Because you tempted me by saying, "Producer... are you leaving already...?", I squealed~
1000640597.korean: "프로듀서... 벌써, 갈 거야...?" 라고 유혹하는 바람에, 꺄아~

1000640598.english: Hmm, is this the development where the tsundere acts the most spoiled...
1000640598.korean: 흐음, 츤데레가 가장 응석을 부리는 전개입니까...

1000640599.english: It's so standard that I have nothing to say.

1000640600.english: Ahaha... S-S-I just took a shower, but why is it so hot...
1000640600.korean: 아하하... 샤, 샤워하고 왔는데 왜 이렇게 덥지...

1000640601.english: Well, thanks to you, Linti got even more love, so I'll just say thank you~
1000640601.korean: 뭐, 덕분에 린티도 더 귀여움 받았으니까 고맙다고 해둘게~

1000640602.english: Hmm... but Blacky is acting all distracted~

1000640607.english: Do we happen to have the same thought?
1000640607.korean: 저희 혹시, 같은 생각을 하고 있습니까?

1000640609.english: No, never mind, just help me move this!
1000640609.korean: 돼, 됐으니까 이거 옮기는 거나 좀 도와줘~!

1000640610.english: Mmm... Producer... I really like you...

1000640611.english: I wonder if it will work...

1000640612.english: I've done everything I can, so... I'll just have to wait and see.
1000640612.korean: 할 수 있는 건 다 했으니까... 기다려봐야지.

1000640616.english: It's not that I don't have that intention, but... Still, it's a bit off.
1000640616.korean: 그런 의도가 없는 건 아니지만... 그래도 좀 그렇네.

1000640617.english: I just want you guys to be happy.
1000640617.korean: 난 그냥 너희가 행복했으면 좋겠을 뿐이야.

1000640619.english: Explain the situation to Cerestia and tell her to stall for as much time as possible.
1000640619.korean: 세레스티아한테 상황 설명하고, 최대한 시간을 끌어달라고 전해줘.

1000640620.english: ... Sorry. I couldn't find it. You guys should go up, even if it's just the two of you.

1000640638.english: ... Could you explain the situation first?

1000640642.english: I'm sorry I couldn't pay more attention.

1000640643.english: Ugly, you say? Where are you going?

1000640644.english: You said it was pretty before, didn't you?

1000640645.english: I was serious. Saying they'll come back again, and that they can come to the captain's cabin anytime.
1000640645.korean: 진심이었어. 다시 찾아가겠다는 것도, 아무때나 함장실에 와도 된다는 것도.

1000640646.english: Yeah. Living with our team members, I just can't live without it anymore.
1000640646.korean: 응. 우리 대원들이랑 지내다보니 안그러면 못 살겠더라구.

1000640647.english: So, Muse, will you tell me your true feelings too?

1000640648.english: Hmm... Okay. The song I was working on then would be good.
1000640648.korean: 음... 그래. 그때 만들고 있던 곡이 좋겠다.

1000640649.english: With a song filled with heart.

1000640654.english: When you come back, will you be able to sing the ending song?

1000640656.english: Yeah. Everyone listened to Muse's songs.

1000640657.english: The person I dislike... At least I can't see it.
1000640657.korean: 싫어하는 사람은... 적어도 내 눈엔 안보이는데?

1000640659.english: So... I wanted to heal the muse's wounds in my own way.
1000640659.korean: 그래서... 내 멋대로 뮤즈의 상처를 치료해주고 싶었어.

1000640662.english: I like how they're scared but still desperately trying to convey their true feelings.
1000640662.korean: 무서워하면서도, 필사적으로 진심을 전하려고 하는 모습이 좋아.

1000640663.english: So... Will you come back and sing another song?
1000640663.korean: 그러니까... 돌아와서 또 다른 노래를 불러줄래?

1000640665.english: Hello. Did you enjoy the performance?

1000640668.english: It probably worked. Because I asked them to do it right after the performance.
1000640668.korean: 아마 됐을 거야. 공연 끝나면 바로 해달라고 했으니까.

1000640669.english: But Tiamat, did you like singing?

1000640671.english: It's okay. Tiamat sometimes wears a maid outfit and takes care of us, doesn't she?
1000640671.korean: 괜찮아. 티아멧이 가끔씩 메이드복 입고 시중 들어주잖아.

1000640673.english: Yeah. Aurora, please keep being friendly.

1000640674.english: Then I... You should go where you belong.
1000640674.korean: 그럼 나는... 있어야 할 곳으로 가야지.

1000640684.english: Yeah… A good male knows a good female. I already knew the Commander would choose me.&nIt may be a story of the distant future, but I'm sure a very strong successor will be born among us.&nUntil then, I will assist the Commander as Queen of Pride. Have you forgotten our goal?&nI... believe that my spouse, the Commander, is a very strong male who can hold all bioroids.&n
1000640684.korean: 그래… 우수한 수컷은 우수한 암컷을 알아보는 법. 사령관이 나를 선택할거라는 건 이미 알고 있었어.&n먼 미래의 이야기가 되겠지만, 우리 사이에선 분명 아주 강인한 후계자가 탄생하겠지.&n그때까지는 프라이드의 여왕으로서 사령관을 돕도록 하겠어. 우리의 목표, 잊지 않았지?&n나는… 내 배우자인 사령관이… 모든 바이오로이드를 품을 수 있는… 아주 강인한 수컷이라고, 생각하는데?

1000640685.english: Another day is over... Good job.

1000640686.english: Thank you for your hard work. Judging by the reconnaissance area expanding eastward, it seems they're about to move.
1000640686.korean: 수고하셨습니다. 정찰 구역이 동쪽으로 넓어진걸보니, 곧 이동하려는 것 같군요.

1000640687.english: Where are they going this time...?

1000640688.english: It's almost summer, isn't it? You'll probably go somewhere you can spend your vacation.
1000640688.korean: 이제 곧 여름이잖아. 휴가를 보낼만한 곳으로 가려고 하실 거야.

1000640689.english: That's right. It's obvious what that idiot is thinking.
1000640689.korean: 그렇네. 그 바보가 생각하는 게 뻔하지 뭐.

1000640692.english: Swimsuit... It'll be hard to get, right?

1000640693.english: Oh dear. Are you planning events on the beach now too?
1000640693.korean: 이런이런. 이제 해변에서의 이벤트까지 노리는 겁니까?

1000640694.english: The main series has already ended, so let's aim for the OVA. Especially OVAs often have a high level of intimacy, so the situations are much more sweet and cuddly.
1000640694.korean: 본편은 이미 종영했으니 OVA를 노려보시죠. 특히 OVA는 수위가 높은 경우가 많아서 훨씬 알콩달콩하고 꽁냥꽁냥한 시추에이션을-

1000640695.english: Hey! Just keep it hidden and live as you were!
1000640695.korean: 야! 너 그냥 원래대로 숨기고 살아!

1000640698.english: The former commander wants to write a rolling paper and give it to the commander.
1000640698.korean: 전대장이 롤링페이퍼 써서 사령관한테 주고 싶대.

1000640699.english: We got a lot of help from the commander this time. So, with a grateful heart!
1000640699.korean: 우리 이번에 사령관한테 엄청 도움 받았잖아. 그러니까 감사하는 마음을 담아서!

1000640700.english: I'm going to write a few words on these sticky notes and stick them on this big paper here.
1000640700.korean: 이렇게 메모지에 짧게 한 마디씩 쓰고, 여기 큰 종이에다 붙일거야.

1000640702.english: I'm in favor. Because gratitude and affection shouldn't just be kept in your heart.
1000640702.korean: 나는 찬성이야. 감사랑 애정은 마음 속에 담고만 있으면 안되니까.

1000640703.english: It's boring just writing, so I should decorate it a bit.
1000640703.korean: 그냥 글만 쓰면 심심하니까 좀 꾸며야겠어.

1000640704.english: Linti is going to show what she's got~

1000640705.english: It would be okay if there were some photos.
1000640705.korean: 사진 같은 것들이 좀 있어도 괜찮겠군요.

1000640706.english: ...On the photos we took... Hmm. I'll ask Mr. Feather.
1000640706.korean: 저희가 찍었던 사진들에다가... 흠. 페더 양한테 문의를 해보겠습니다.

1000640707.english: Um... I made another song to play for the producer.
1000640707.korean: 저... 프로듀서에게 들려드리려고 노래를 하나 더 만들었어요.

1000640708.english: While I'm giving you this... I was thinking, how about I sing that song for you...?
1000640708.korean: 이걸 드리면서... 그 노래를 불러드리면 어떨까 싶어요...

1000640713.english: Alright, then! Let's wrap up the first album activities of the Sky Knights and Muse!
1000640713.korean: 자, 그럼! 스카이나이츠와 뮤즈의 1집 활동을 마무리 해보자구!

1000640714.english: - Shortly after the Sky Knights' idol debut stage, which turned out to be a grander event than expected, I came to my senses...
1000640714.korean: - 생각보다 성대한 행사가 되어버린 스카이나이츠의 아이돌 데뷔 무대가 끝나고 얼마 뒤, 정신을 차려보니...

1000640715.english: - I found myself humming a Sky Knights song without even realizing it.
1000640715.korean: - 나도 모르게 스카이나이츠의 곡을 흥얼거리고 있었다.

1000640716.english: - While I was at it, I manipulated the panel to find the music file.
1000640716.korean: - 생각난 김에 패널을 조작해 음악 파일을 찾았다.

1000640717.english: - To avoid interfering with work, I selected and played the MR version without lyrics, then scanned the list of vacation plans of the team members that densely filled the panel.
1000640717.korean: - 업무에 방해되지 않도록 가사가 없는 MR버전을 골라 실행시킨 뒤, 패널을 빽빽히 채운 대원들의 휴가계획 리스트를 훑어보았다.

1000640718.english: - Singing contest, fashion show, Steel Line Online League, hell training, beach volleyball tournament, Muscle Queen contest, a hot week with Master, etc...
1000640718.korean: - 노래 경연, 패션쇼, 스틸라인 온라인 리그전, 지옥훈련, 비치발리볼 대회, 머슬퀸 대회, 주인님과의 뜨거운 일주일 등등...

1000640719.english: - This needs some sorting out. I told them to freely plan what they wanted to do this summer, and a wide variety of things I never even imagined came up...
1000640719.korean: - 이건 좀 정리가 필요하겠군. 여름에 하고 싶은 일을 자유롭게 기획해 보라고 했더니 상상도 못했던 다종다양한 것들이...

1000640720.english: - As I turned my eyes away from the proposals where I felt I could identify the presenters without even looking, the image of the Sky Knights heading out on a reconnaissance mission flashed through my mind on the command panel.
1000640720.korean: - 보지 않아도 발제자를 알 수 있을 것만 같은 기획안들에서 눈을 돌리자, 지휘 패널에 마침 정찰 임무를 나서는 스카이나이츠의 모습이 떠올랐다.

1000640721.english: - Muse is seeing them off, and the rest are wearing combat suits again for the first time in a while... Huh?
1000640721.korean: - 뮤즈가 배웅하고 있고, 나머지는 오랜만에 다시 전투용 슈트를 입은... 어?

1000640722.english: - The sound is off so I can't hear it, but just by looking at the expressions on Griffon and Black Hound's faces, I think I know what they are saying.
1000640722.korean: - 소리는 꺼두어서 들리지 않지만, 그리폰과 블랙 하운드의 표정만 봐도 무슨 말을 하는지 알 것 같다.

1000640723.english: - Nevertheless, Sleipnir wears a smug expression, undeterred at all. You've really grown up...
1000640723.korean: - 그럼에도 전혀 기죽지 않고 으쓱한 표정을 짓는 슬레이프니르. 성장했구나...

1000640724.english: - wanted to keep watching the team members, who seemed to be having fun despite their bickering, but I turned my attention back to the numerous project proposals.
1000640724.korean: - 티격태격하면서도 즐거워보이는 대원들의 모습을 계속해서 보고 싶었지만, 다시 수많은 기획안들로 눈을 돌렸다.

1000640725.english: - Because there are still mountains of things I want to do with my loved ones this coming summer.
1000640725.korean: - 다가오는 여름, 사랑하는 사람들과 해보고 싶은 일은 아직도 산더미처럼 남아있으니까.

1000640726.english: Lover, lover, beyond that sky- hot.

1000640729.english: What's hell training now...? Should I participate too?

1000640730.english: ... Sleipnir is still in her idol outfit.

1000640731.english: Okay... What should we do this summer?

1000640732.english: - Step, step. I am wandering back and forth through the corridors of the Orca. It seems there are various facilities inside the ship.
1000640732.korean: - 뚜벅뚜벅. 오르카 함의 복도를 이리저리 돌아다니고 있다.&n함 내에는 다양한 시설이 있는 모양이다.

1000640733.english: Oh my! Oh my! Commander? Running into my sister here—is it a coincidence? Or is it destiny?
1000640733.korean: 어머! 어머! 사령관 님? 이런 데서 누나랑 마주친 건 우연? 아니면 필연?

1000640734.english: The Orca is so big, how did you wander around alone? Big sister will give you a proper tour!
1000640734.korean: 오르카 호가 얼마나 넓은데 혼자 돌아다녔어?&n누나가 제대로 가이드해 줄께!

1000640735.english: To make matters worse, the ship's facilities weren't fully maintained because the base was attacked and we had to retreat in a hurry, you know?
1000640735.korean: 그렇지 않아도 기지가 공격 받아 급히 퇴각하는 바람에&n함 내 시설이 완전히 정비되진 않았거든?

1000640736.english: Still, I’ve built the essential facilities: the warehouse, the archives, and the captain’s quarters. Shall we take a look at the captain’s quarters first? It’ll be nice for the two of us to spend some quality time together...
1000640736.korean: 그래도 필수적인 시설인 창고, 기록물 보관소, 함장실은 만들어뒀어.&n우리 우선 함장실을 구경해볼까? 둘이 오붓한 시간도 보낼 겸…...

1000640737.english: The archives is where information about combatants and combat zones is recorded, you know? It would be a good idea to visit if you've forgotten any information!
1000640737.korean: 기록물 보관소는 전투원과 전투 지역의 정보를 기록해두는 곳이거든?&n잊어먹은 정보가 있을 때는 한번 방문하는 것도 좋을 거야!

1000640738.english: - It is not very spacious, but it is a cozy and well-organized space. Judging by the complete absence of dust, it appears that someone has consistently maintained it.
1000640738.korean: - 그리 넓지는 않지만 잘 정돈된 아늑한 공간.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                먼지 한 톨 없는 것으로 보아 누군가 꾸준히 관리한 듯 하다.

1000640739.english: Oh my, Master. You're here? Actually, I was checking the cleanliness of the captain's quarters since you need to stay there.
1000640739.korean: 어머, 주인님. 오셨어요? 그렇지 않아도 함장실에서 지내셔야 해서&n청소 상태를 점검하고 있었어요.

1000640740.english: Oh my! Oh my! Constantia, so you were here…

1000640741.english: Yes, Fortune. It looks like the Commander will be using this place soon.&nSo you're here to help show the Commander around?
1000640741.korean: 네, 포츈 언니. 사령관 님이 여기를 곧 쓰실 것 같아서요.&n언니는 사령관 님의 안내를 도와드리러 오신거군요?

1000640742.english: Hmm... I suppose you could say that... Commander, let's look around other places!
1000640742.korean: 으응… 그렇다고도 볼 수 있을 것도 같은데…&n사령관 님, 우리 다른 곳도 둘러보자!

1000640743.english: Still, there will be plenty of opportunities ahead! Right, Commander?
1000640743.korean: 그래도 앞으로도 기회는 많으니깐! 그렇지 사령관 님?

1000640744.english: As you can see, there are many spaces whose purpose hasn't been determined yet, you know? You'll issue the order to modify them to suit your taste, Commander, right?
1000640744.korean: 보다시피 아직 용도가 정해지지 않은 공간이 많거든?&n사령관 님의 취향에 맞게… 개조 명령을 내려줄 거지?

1000640745.english: - I had heard a rough explanation of the research lab from Fortune earlier, but this is the first time I have actually visited.
1000640745.korean: - 앞서 포츈에게 연구소에 대한 대략적인 설명을 듣긴 했지만&n직접 와보는 것은 이번이 처음이다.

1000640746.english: (To research and expand the ship's facilities, and to design and manufacture the robots called AGS, I'd like to have someone's help... Hmm?)
1000640746.korean: (함내 시설을 연구하여 확충하고, AGS라 불리우는 로봇을 설계하고 제작하려면&n누군가의 도움이 있으면 좋겠는데… 음?)

1000640747.english: You are the Commander, right? I heard about it from Fortune. I am Combat Engineer Gremlin, greeting you!
1000640747.korean: 사령관님 맞으시죠? 포츈 언니에게 전해들었어요.&n전투 공병 그렘린 인사드립니다!

1000640748.english: Hehe. Commander, you seem to have a lot of interest in robots, too? This one is a Tower Drum. It is an AMG-11 model with an assembly-type automatic turret.
1000640748.korean: 후후. 사령관님도 로봇에 관심이 많으시군요?&n얘는 탑돌이에요. 조립형 자동 포탑으로 AMG-11 모델이에요.

1000640749.english: The AMG-11 model is well-known for operating reliably even in polar regions and high mountainous areas. Above all… its white, round appearance is just so cute!
1000640749.korean: AMG-11 모델은 극지방과 고산악 지대에서도 안정적으로 작동하기로 정평이 나 있죠.&n무엇보다도… 하얗고 동글동글한 모습이 너~무 귀엽다구요!

1000640750.english: At the research institute, you can study various machinery and robots. That is why I, a mechanical engineering major, am helping Fortune!
1000640750.korean: 연구소에는 여러 기계장치와 로봇에 대해 연구할 수 있어요.&n그래서 기계 공학을 전공한 제가 포츈 언니를 돕고 있습니다!

1000640751.english: First of all, the activation of onboard infrastructure for research must be prioritized. Unlike bioroids, to manufacture AGS, we need to research robot manufacturing facilities.
1000640751.korean: 우선 연구를 위한 함내 기반 시설 활성화가 선행되어야 해요.&n바이오로이드와는 달리 AGS를 제작하려면 로봇 제작 설비를 연구해야 하구요.

1000640752.english: Constantia is approaching with a flushed face. It looks like she has some good news...
1000640752.korean: - 콘스탄챠가 한껏 상기된 표정으로 다가오고 있다.&n뭔가 기분 좋은 소식이 있는 듯 한데…

1000640753.english: Master. I heard from Fortune that the onboard combat simulator facility has been installed.
1000640753.korean: 주인님. 함내 모의 전투 시뮬레이터 설비가 구축되었다는 소식을&n포츈 언니에게 전해 들었어요.

1000640754.english: That's great! Now we can safely practice fighting Iron Bug in virtual reality inside the ship.
1000640754.korean: 잘 되었어요! 이제 함내에서 가상현실로 안전하게&n철충과의 전투를 연습할 수 있게 되었네요.

1000640755.english: The comrade who haven't joined us yet must still be in danger... I want to gain strength as soon as possible!
1000640755.korean: 아직 우리와 합류하지 못한 자매들이 위험에 처해 있을 텐데…&n어서 힘을 기르고 싶어요!

1000640756.english: Master, Mou~... Ah, let's hurry and go to the simulator facility together!
1000640756.korean: 주인님도 참… 어, 얼른 시뮬레이터 설비로 같이 가봐요!

1000640757.english: You can see the control panel behind me, right? Even though it is virtual reality, since the battle takes place in a simulation environment identical to reality, you need to select a target that matches your current level.
1000640757.korean: 제 뒤로 조작 패널이 보이시죠? 비록 가상현실이지만 실제와 동일한&n시뮬레이션 환경에서 전투를 펼치는 거라 현재 수준에 맞는 대상을 골라주셔야 해요.

1000640758.english: Fortune has set the training content to change by day of the week to provide a variety of combat experiences. Please note that the number of training sessions is limited due to resource constraints.
1000640758.korean: 포츈 언니가 다양한 전투 경험을 위해 요일 별로 훈련 내용이 달라지게 설정해 두셨어요.&n자원 한계 상 훈련 횟수가 정해져 있으니 참고해주세요.

1000640760.english: My Lord. Reconnaissance of the mine I reported on last week has progressed to some extent. Lord Griffon's assistance in this regard was significant.
1000640760.korean: 주군. 지난주에 보고드린 광산에 대한 정찰이 어느정도 진행되었다네.&n이와 관련해서 그리핀 공의 도움이 컸지.

1000640761.english: Hmm... hmm, it wasn't that difficult of a mission. Originally, it was hard to get in because it was swarming with Iron Bugs, but guess what? A large force started leaving the day before yesterday.
1000640761.korean: 흠..흠 그다지 어려운 임무는 아니었어. 원래는 철충들이 득시글거려 진입이 힘들었는데,&n그저께부터 대규모 부대가 빠져나가지 뭐야?

1000640762.english: I quickly infiltrated during that gap and finished scouting the interior. There were some Iron Bugs remaining for defense, but their numbers weren't large.
1000640762.korean: 그 틈에 잽싸게 잠입해서 내부 정찰을 마쳤지.&n방어를 위해 일부 철충들이 남아있긴 하지만 그 수가 많지는 않았어.

1000640763.english: You are absolutely right, my lord. Griffon will also gain strength under your rule!
1000640763.korean: 지당하신 말씀이오, 주군.&n주군의 치하에 그리핀 공도 힘을 얻을 것이오!

1000640764.english: W-what's wrong with you two? I was just doing my job! Th-anyway, Iron Bugs have been observed digging up a lot of unidentified metal minerals in the mine.
1000640764.korean: 부, 부끄럽게 둘 다 왜 이래? 난 그냥 할 일을 했을 뿐이야!&n그, 그건 그렇고 광산에서 철충들이 미확인 금속 광물을 잔뜩 캐는게 관찰되었어.

1000640765.english: Wait! Wait! From here on, Fortune is going to share the analysis results for the Commander, okay? First, shall we look at the mineral sample Griffon obtained together while we talk?
1000640765.korean: 잠깐! 잠깐! 여기서부터는 포츈 누나가 사령관 님을 위해 분석 결과를 알려줄 거거든?&n우선 그리폰이 입수한 광물 표본을 같이 보면서 이야기할까?

1000640766.english: - The specimen emitting a soft light looks familiar, but it is clearly a form never seen anywhere.
1000640766.korean: - 은은한 빛을 발산하는 표본은 익숙한 듯 하나, 분명 어디서도 본 적이 없는 형태이다.

1000640767.english: What do you think, Commander? It looks like an extraordinary mineral, doesn't it? I'm currently running various tests on it... and this thing definitely seems like something special.
1000640767.korean: 어때, 사령관 님? 사령관 님이 보기에도 범상치 않은 광물이지?&n현재 이런저런 테스트를 해보고 있는데… 이 녀석 확실히 물건인 듯 하거든?

1000640768.english: Once you do some research, it will definitely help improve existing equipment, you know? You can tell just by looking at how the Iron Bugs mine in massive quantities, you know?
1000640768.korean: 어느 정도 연구를 거치면 기존 장비를 개량하는데 확실히 도움이 될 거거든?&n철충들이 대량으로 채굴하는 것만 봐도 알 수 있거든?

1000640770.english: ... Listening to Your Excellency the Commander, it certainly seems that the mineral will be of great help in boosting our military strength. However, I am concerned that we cannot accurately predict when the main force of the Iron Bug will return.
1000640770.korean: ... 확실히 사령관 각하의 말씀을 들어보니 그 광물이 우리 전력 상승에 큰 도움이 될 것 같군요.&n다만 철충의 본대가 언제 귀환할 지 정확히 예측할 수 없는 점이 우려됩니다.

1000640771.english: Princess Marie’s concerns are certainly valid. To ensure that, I have made a special request to Princess Scathy.
1000640771.korean: 마리 공의 우려는 확실히 일리가 있소. 그 부분을 확실히 하기 위해&n스카디 공에게 특별히 부탁해 둔 것이 있다네.

1000640772.english: This is Scathy! Can you hear me, Commander? I’m out near the mine to decipher the Iron Bug’s transmissions.
1000640772.korean: 여기는 스카디! 들리시나요, 사령관 님?&n저는 철충들의 교신 전파를 해독하기 위해 광산 근처로 나와있어요.

1000640773.english: I did have a bit of a hard time because of the jamming signals designed to block decoding... Hehe. But with my brilliant mind, it didn't take me that long to decode it.
1000640773.korean: 전파 해독을 막기 위한 교란 전파 때문에 조금 애를 먹긴 했지만…&n후훗. 제 명석한 두뇌로는 해독하는데 그리 오래 걸리지 않았답니다.

1000640774.english: It seems the Iron Bug periodically transport the mined metal minerals somewhere. It will take a little more time to figure out the exact destination and use of the minerals, though…
1000640774.korean: 철충들은 채굴한 금속 광물을 주기적으로 어디론가 옮기는 것 같아요.&n광물의 정확한 도착지와 쓰임새를 파악하는 데는 좀 더 시간이 걸리겠지만…

1000640775.english: One thing is certain: now is the perfect time to seize the position while the main Iron Bug force is away. It will take about two weeks for the main force to return.
1000640775.korean: 확실한 것은 철충 본대가 자리를 비운 지금이 탈취의 적기라는 거에요.&n본대가 귀환하는데 약 2주 정도는 걸릴 거에요.

1000640776.english: My Lord, won't you organize a small detachment for me? I am confident that I can seize the minerals while minimizing engagement with the Iron Bug!
1000640776.korean: 주군, 내게 소규모 별동대를 조직해주지 않겠나?&n철충과의 교전을 최소화하며 광물을 탈취해 올 자신이 있다네!

1000640777.english: Knowing yourself and your enemy ensures victory in a hundred battles! If we can only intercept the Iron Bug's communications as we are doing now, we will be able to seize their metal minerals without suffering heavy losses. Your Excellency, Commander.
1000640777.korean: 지피지기면 백전불태라! 지금처럼 철충들의 교신을 낚아챌 수만 있다면,&n큰 피해 없이 적들의 금속 광물을 탈취할 수 있겠습니다. 사령관 각하.

1000640779.english: (Led by Fortune's hand, I leave the captain's cabin.)

1000640780.english: ...Okay. Are there any other facilities you'd like to introduce?

1000640782.english: Then, shall we start by activating the ship's infrastructure?

1000640783.english: Then let's go to the captain's cabin.

1000640784.english: Then we should discuss the mineral extraction operation.
1000640784.korean: 그렇다면 광물 탈취 작전을 논의해봐야 겠군.

1000640789.english: Which study should I start with?

1000640790.english: What are you doing at the research institute?

1000640791.english: Yeah. The research was recently completed.

1000640792.english: Okay. Lead the special forces well, Johanna.

1000640794.english: Constantia sure have a warm heart.

1000640795.english: If it's something I specifically requested?

1000640796.english: I was walking around the ship.

1000640798.english: Then let's go to the captain's cabin.

1000640799.english: What are you doing at the research institute?

1000640801.english: This action is deemed to be an attempt by this entity to establish a marital bond with you. Your request will be approved.&nThis entity… no, Mnemosyne has special feelings for you, Administrator.&nWhen the administrator called me by my nickname, 'Mnemosyne', which was originally just a model name, something sprouted inside me.&nThat's what makes me feel joy in receiving this ring. I ask that you continue to use me until you define what this feeling is.&n
1000640801.korean: 해당 행위는 본 개체가 관리자님과 부부의 연을 맺는 것이라고 판단됩니다. 요청을 승인합니다.&n본 개체… 아니, 므네모시네는 관리자님에게 특별한 감정을 품고 있습니다.&n관리자님이 본디 모델명에 불과한 ‘므네모시네’라는 인식명을 불러주셨을 때, 제 안에서 무언가가 싹텄습니다.&n그것이 저로 하여금, 이 반지를 받는 것에서 기쁨을 느끼게 합니다. 이 감정이 무엇인지 정의할 때까지, 저를 계속 사용해주시길 요청합니다.

1000640802.english: Commander, do you know why I tried so hard to speak so casually? Because I was different, I didn't want to seem like an outlier.&n...You teased me sometimes, but you always told me to be comfortable. So...&nFrom now on, I'll call you ""Big Brother-ya."" Yeah. I find that comfortable too. Big Brother-ya, don't you have a nickname for me, like...?"
1000640802.korean: 사령관님, 제가 왜 그렇게 평범한 말투를 쓰려고 노력했는지 아세요? 저만 다르니까, 별종으로 보이는 게 싫었거든요.&n...가끔 놀리시긴 하셨지만, 그래도 사령관님은 계속 편하게 하라고 말씀해주셨어요. 그러니까…&n앞으로는 오빠야, 라고 부를게. 응. 내도 이게 편하다. 오빠야도 내한테 뭐, 애칭같은거 없나...?

1000640803.english: I tried to keep my distance as much as possible, but it was all for nothing. No, it's not that, it's a personal matter.&n... Being by your side makes me forget everything, and I just want to be held in your arms. Okay. As you said, it's a little bit now.&nI think I can rest now. The world needs you to save it. And... me too.
1000640803.korean: 가급적 거리를 두려고 했는데… 다 소용 없었네요. 아뇨, 그런 게 아니라 제 개인적인 문제에요.&n...당신 곁에 있으면 전부 잊고, 품에 안기고 싶으니까요. 그래요. 당신 말대로, 이젠 조금&n쉬어도 될 것 같아요. 세계는 당신이 구해줘요. 그리고… 저도.

1000640804.english: I came as you said... but, Savior. Are you okay? My heart is racing, calm down...&nSo that's what you were nervous about. Oh no... I'm happy, embarrassed, and nervous all at once... I don't even know which emotion is mine anymore...&nLight... no, if the Savior allows... can I call you my companion from now on?"
1000640804.korean: 말씀대로 찾아왔습니다… 만, 구원자님. 괜찮으세요? 마음이 동요하고 있어요, 침착…&n이것 때문에 긴장하고 계셨군요. 어떡해… 기쁘고, 부끄럽고, 긴장되고… 어느 게 제 감정인지 모르겠어요…&n빛이… 아니, 구원자님께서 허락하신다면… 앞으로 반려님, 이라고 부르면 되나요?

1000640810.english: - After successfully completing the Sky Knights' idol debut, the members were still lost in the afterglow, but I returned to work a step ahead.
1000640810.korean: - 스카이나이츠의 아이돌 데뷔를 성공적으로 마친 뒤, 대원들은 아직 여운에 잠겨 있었지만 나는 한 발 먼저 일과로 돌아왔다.

1000640811.english: - As usual, handling personnel deployments for infrastructure across the region, material supply routes, and unit assignment documents for newly joined members...
1000640811.korean: - 평소처럼 각지 인프라에 대한 인원배치와 물자 공급 루트, 새로 합류한 대원들에 대한 부대 배속 서류를 처리하고...

1000640812.english: - I was only able to breathe a sigh of relief after confirming the regular reports related to the Iron Tower, the paper 'Correlation between the Star Child and FAN Waves' submitted by the Doctor, and even the intelligence on Lemonade Omega's movements.
1000640812.korean: - 철의 탑과 관련된 정기보고서, 닥터가 제출한 '별의 아이와 FAN파의 상관성' 논문, 레모네이드 오메가의 동향 첩보까지 확인한 뒤에야 한숨을 돌릴 수 있었다.

1000640813.english: - The reconnaissance of the island nation in the Pacific, which we arrived at recently, is also proceeding smoothly... Come to think of it, wasn't this country the setting of the VR game where I met Leanne?
1000640813.korean: - 얼마전 도착한, 태평양 방면의 섬나라에 대한 정찰도 순조롭게 진행되고 있고... 그러고보니 리앤을 만났던 VR게임의 배경이 이 나라였던가.

1000640814.english: - Feeling relieved after finishing my homework, I left the captain's quarters and headed to the beach where the Orca was anchored.
1000640814.korean: - 숙제를 마친 홀가분한 기분으로 함장실을 나와 오르카 호가 정박한 해변으로 향했다.

1000640816.english: Here, here! Captain, lift it up here!

1000640821.english: Consecutive errors by strong championship contender Cannonier!

1000640823.english: Hmm. The enemy's attack is fierce.

1000640824.english: Captain, that was the ball raised by our forces.

1000640825.english: At this rate, it will end...

1000640826.english: Ahaha, it can't be helped! It's a well-known fact on the Orca that the Captain is bad at ball sports.
1000640826.korean: 아하핫, 어쩔 수 없지! 대장이 구기종목에 약한 건 오르카호에서도 유명한 사실이잖아.

1000640827.english: I just need to score points, so let's focus!

1000640828.english: Raven, sorry to Libero, but can you toss it straight to me? No matter the angle, I'll sink it!
1000640828.korean: 레이븐, 리베로한테 미안한데, 나한테 바로 토스 올려줄 수 있어? 어떤 각도로 주든 내가 다 때려넣을게!

1000640832.english: The breeze is nice~ The angle is good~

1000640833.english: That's a good height to score points, yaa!

1000640834.english: Ah! Just when cornered, Pani scores! Scores!
1000640834.korean: 앗! 위기에 몰린 순간, 파니 선수 득점! 득점!
