1000640835.english: The outcome of the match is unpredictable! Just how much better can this player get from here!
1000640835.korean: 승부의 행방을 알 수 없습니다! 이 선수, 여기서 얼마나 더 잘해지나요!

1000640836.english: - The beach volleyball tournament in full swing was the first thing to catch my eye.
1000640836.korean: - 한창 경기가 진행중인 비치발리볼 대회가 가장 먼저 눈에 들어왔다.

1000640837.english: - The summer vacation planned by the members themselves since spring sparked an explosive response.
1000640837.korean: - 봄부터 계획한 대원들 스스로 만드는 여름 휴가는 폭발적인 반응을 불러왔다.

1000640838.english: - The crew members formed small groups to plan various sights and activities, and the Orca was buzzing with anticipation even before summer had officially begun.
1000640838.korean: - 대원들은 삼삼오오 짝을 지어 여러가지 볼거리와 할거리들을 기획했고, 여름이 본격적으로 시작되기도 전부터 오르카 호는 기대감으로 달아올랐다.

1000640839.english: - Thanks to that, a massive amount of work involving event review and approval has been added, but adding 1 to 1000 doesn't even make a difference, so...
1000640839.korean: - 덕분에 대량의 행사 검토와 승인이라는 업무가 추가되고 말았지만, 1000에다 1을 더해봐야 티도 안나니까 뭐...

1000640840.english: - On the wide sandy beach, the team members are spending their vacation in their own ways.
1000640840.korean: - 넓은 모래사장에서 대원들은 각자의 방식으로 휴가를 보내고 있다.

1000640841.english: - Seeing the swimsuits Audrey made or found for herself, along with her cheerful expression, puts me in a good mood too.
1000640841.korean: - 오드리가 만들어주거나 스스로 조달한 수영복과 해맑은 표정에 나까지 기분이 좋아진다.

1000640843.english: What are you thinking about so seriously?

1000640844.english: - I thought no one was around, but a salamander spoke to me from the side.
1000640844.korean: - 아무도 없는 줄 알았는데 옆에서 샐러맨더가 말을 걸어왔다.

1000640845.english: Hahaha, what's wrong? Why the long face?

1000640846.english: Well. Ever since the commander was looking lewdly at the other kids' bodies?
1000640846.korean: 글쎄. 사령관이 다른 애들 몸을 음흉하게 보고 있었을 때부터?

1000640847.english: There you go again~ I told you there's no need to act so refined!
1000640847.korean: 또 그런다~ 그렇게 점잖은 척 할 필요 없다니까?

1000640848.english: - The salamander, who had been laughing cheerfully at me for changing the subject, put on a serious expression.
1000640848.korean: - 말을 돌리는 나를 보며 쾌활하게 웃던 샐러맨더가 짐짓 심각한 표정을 지었다.

1000640849.english: Oh, really? If I win the bet, I can show you more.
1000640849.korean: 오오, 그래? 내기해서 이기면 더 보여줄 수도 있어.

1000640850.english: - In response to my joke, Salamander tucked her thumb into her waistband, pulled her pants down slightly, and gave me a meaningful look.
1000640850.korean: - 내 농담에 샐러맨더는 엄지 손가락을 허리춤에 넣어 바지를 살짝 끌어내리며 의미심장한 얼굴을 했다.

1000640851.english: But this is a big problem. To think a championship contender would show a change in expression over something like this.
1000640851.korean: 그런데 이거 큰일인데. 우승 후보가 고작 이정도에 표정 변화를 보이다니.

1000640853.english: - The documents that Salamander pulled from her holster brought back painful memories of a defeat I had wanted to forget.
1000640853.korean: - 샐러맨더가 홀스터에서 꺼내 내민 서류에 잊고 싶었던 아픈 패배의 기억이 떠올랐다.

1000640854.english: - It wasn't that I couldn't accept the poker tournament proposal, but it was too subtle to readily agree to, so I asked Salamander for a bet half-jokingly, and in return, I suffered a crushing defeat.
1000640854.korean: - 안되는 건 아니지만, 흔쾌히 허락하기에는 미묘한 포커 대회 기획서에 나는 반쯤 장난으로 샐러맨더에게 내기를 요청했고, 그 대가로 처참한 패배를 맛보게 됐다.

1000640855.english: - I should have just quietly given permission...

1000640856.english: You're looking forward to the poker tournament?

1000640858.english: - In addition to the poker tournament permit that has already been written, blank documents are fluttering in the salamander's hand.
1000640858.korean: - 이미 작성된 포커 대회 허가서 외에도, 빈 서류가 샐러맨더의 손에서 팔락이고 있다.

1000640861.english: Oops, when did I turn into a tiger?

1000640862.english: Let's play one more round! I'm betting the event permit you snatched from me again! This time, I'll really put you in your place!
1000640862.korean: 한 판 더 해! 나한테 따간 행사 허가서 다시 걸고! 이번에야말로 네 코를 납작하게 해주겠어!

1000640863.english: I don't want to~ I'm not going to do it~

1000640865.english: Oh, perfect timing. Commander! Do something about this guy! She's running away after taking the prize!
1000640865.korean: 아, 마침 잘됐다. 사령관! 얘 좀 어떻게 해봐! 따놓고 도망가잖아!

1000640866.english: What, what is this? What's wrong with it?

1000640868.english: Watch closely. That is the proper attitude of a loser.
1000640868.korean: 잘 보라구. 저게 바로 패배자의 바람직한 자세야.

1000640869.english: - I almost lost my composure because of the salamander's cheerful laughter, but I managed to hold it in.
1000640869.korean: - 샐러맨더의 쾌활한 웃음 때문에 평상심에 금이 갈 뻔 했지만 간신히 참아냈다.

1000640870.english: What am I supposed to do if you just keep asking to play one more round? Do you have anything to bet on?
1000640870.korean: 자꾸 그냥 한 판 더하자고만 하면 어떡해? 걸 건 있어?

1000640871.english: Will you walk? Yeah, I do.

1000640873.english: Hahaha, are you trying to wager some rations or supplies? With that... huh?
1000640873.korean: 캬하하핫, 부식이나 보급품이라도 걸려고? 그거로는... 어?

1000640875.english: - Unexpected fireworks lit up the beach. Since it coincided with the moment of victory from Fanny's powerful strike, everyone seemed to mistake it for a staged performance.
1000640875.korean: - 때아닌 폭죽이 해변가를 수놓았다. 마침 파니의 강스트라이크로 승리하는 순간과 겹쳐서 다들 연출로 받아들인 모양이다.

1000640876.english: - With those fireworks in the background, Arsenal looked at me from afar and gave me a thumbs up.
1000640876.korean: - 그런 폭죽을 배경으로, 저 멀리서 아스널이 나를 보며 엄지손가락을 치켜세웠다.

1000640877.english: - I don't know if I should say they are shameless, or that they never lose their dignity in any situation. I waved to Arsenal, who were not embarrassed at all by their countless mistakes.
1000640877.korean: - 뻔뻔하다고 해야할지, 어떤 상황에서도 품위를 잃지 않는다고 해야할지. 수없는 미스에도 조금도 민망해하지 않는 아스널에게 손을 흔들어 주었다.

1000640879.english: Do you remember this evening's memorial service?
1000640879.korean: 오늘 저녁의 기념 예배, 기억하고 계십니까?

1000640880.english: - Worried that I might have forgotten, I checked the schedule with the panel I was holding. Fortunately, among the major and minor events, I saw an item for the Kohei Memorial Service.
1000640880.korean: - 혹시 잊은 게 아닌가 싶어 들고 있던 패널로 일과표를 확인했다. 다행히 굵직하고 자잘한 행사들 가운데에 코헤이 기념 예배 항목이 보였다.

1000640881.english: That is a relief. Since it is a special day, I really hoped you would attend, Savior.
1000640881.korean: 다행입니다. 특별한 날인만큼, 구원자님께서 꼭 참석해주시길 바랐으니까요.

1000640883.english: - Was it said to be the day the savior believed in by the Kohei Order descends? Since I ended up becoming the Order's savior in name only, I was confused about what was going on, but the members of the Order didn't seem to care much.
1000640883.korean: - 코헤이 교단에서 믿는 구원자가 강림하는 날이라고 했던가. 명목상 내가 교단의 구원자가 되어버리는 바람에 뭐가뭔지 모르게 됐지만, 정작 교단의 대원들은 크게 신경쓰지 않는 모양이었다.

1000640884.english: - I remember Azazel checking the scheduled deployment details and dates for the Orca and telling me about them, literally jumping for joy.
1000640884.korean: - 오르카 호 기동 예정 자료와 날짜를 확인한 아자젤이 말 그대로 날아오를 듯 기뻐하며 말해줬던 기억이 난다.

1000640885.english: That is correct. Aerial reconnaissance revealed that it was completely devastated, though.
1000640885.korean: 그렇습니다. 항공 정찰 결과 완전히 폐허가 되기는 했습니다만.

1000640886.english: Yes. Azazel will guide the Savior well.
1000640886.korean: 네. 아자젤님이 구원자님을 잘 안내해드릴 겁니다.

1000640887.english: She came up to me, clearly very excited, and said,

1000640888.english: "Veronica! Ban... no, I decided to go to the Kagoshima branch with the Savior!"
1000640888.korean: "베로니카! 반... 아니, 구원자랑 함께 가고시마 지부에 가기로 했어요!"

1000640889.english: To think I'm alone with the Savior in a place where the touch of light still lingers... This isn't a dream, is it?
1000640889.korean: "빛의 손길이 남아있는 곳에 구원자와 단 둘이라니... 꿈은 아니겠죠?"

1000640893.english: Poi came to recharge for Master before sortieing~
1000640893.korean: 포이, 출격하기 전에 주인님한테 충전하러 왔어요~

1000640894.english: Just like usual, pile it high here. You know what I mean~?

1000640895.english: - I gave Poey, who was clinging to me with a "Nya-ha-ha~," a quick stroke on the head and turned me gaze toward Veronica.
1000640895.korean: - 냐하핫~ 하고 엉겨붙는 포이의 머리를 슥슥 쓰다듬어 주며 베로니카에게 시선을 주었다.

1000640897.english: - I'm sorry, but I have to do the work...

1000640898.english: - As soon as I called out her name, a vampire who had been wandering around unfazed even under the blazing sun strode over with an air of arrogance.
1000640898.korean: - 이름을 부르자, 땡볕에도 멀쩡하게 돌아다니던 흡혈귀 한 명이 도도한 걸음으로 걸어왔다.

1000640900.english: You... It's so funny that... My stomach hurts!

1000640903.english: When my owner called me, I strutted over all proud... and when he said it was time to go out... heh.
1000640903.korean: 주인님이 부르니까 도, 도도하게 걸어와서는... 출격할 시간이라고 하니까... 푸흡.

1000640904.english: Were you hoping for a date request or something?

1000640905.english: Shut up, I had no intention of doing that at all.

1000640906.english: I was just going to ask when you were going to keep your promise to let me perform on stage later.
1000640906.korean: 나중에 무대에 서게 해주겠다는 약속, 언제 지킬건지 물어보려고 했던 것 뿐이야.

1000640908.english: What is it? Do you have something to say?

1000640909.english: No, it's just that... I can clearly see your future, Foy.
1000640909.korean: 아니, 그냥~ 포이는 네 미래가 뻔히 보여서.

1000640910.english: I'm completely stuck, unable to move a muscle, because my master has me... A future where I scream with joy at the sensation of pain and pleasure intertwined.
1000640910.korean: 주인님한테 꼼짝도 못하게 붙잡혀서... 고통이랑 쾌락이 뒤범벅된 감각에 기쁨의 비명을 지르는 미래가.

1000640911.english: Hmph. There's no way this Draculina would end up like that, right? What do you know?
1000640911.korean: 흥. 이 드라큐리나 님이 그런 꼴을 당할리가 없잖아? 네깟게 뭘 안다고.

1000640912.english: Nyaha-hat. Why wouldn't I know? I know.

1000640915.english: The moment I saw my master's strong body and manly appearance... Your mind will definitely go blank.
1000640915.korean: 주인님의 강인한 몸과 남자다운 모습을 보는 순간... 너는 분명 머리속이 새하얘질거야.

1000640916.english: And soon, you'll only be able to think about your master, and nothing else.
1000640916.korean: 그리고 곧, 주인님 말고는 아무것도 생각하지 못하게 되겠지.

1000640917.english: Ugh... Get your hand off me!

1000640919.english: Oh, okay. What do you think?

1000640920.english: Sexual desire between men and women is not wrong, but openly flaunting it is a different matter.
1000640920.korean: 남녀간의 정욕은 그릇된 것이 아니나, 그것을 공공연히 밝히고 다니는 것은 이야기가 다릅니다.

1000640922.english: Ah... Have you ever been loved by Master either?
1000640922.korean: 아하... 혹시 너도 아직 주인님한테 사랑받은 적 없어?

1000640924.english: ...... I felt it when we were fighting just now, but you're really unpredictable.
1000640924.korean: ......좀 전에 싸울때도 느꼈지만, 너 진짜 종잡을 수 없네.

1000640925.english: I am merely fulfilling the Savior's will.

1000640927.english: What on earth is so special about that guy that everyone is singing his praises like that? I really can't understand it.
1000640927.korean: 그깟 인간이 대체 뭐길래 다들 그렇게 노래를 불러? 진짜 이해를 못하겠네.

1000640928.english: There is no reason for faith, but the Savior is different.

1000640929.english: As the Messiah who descended to earth, He personally showed us the way forward.
1000640929.korean: 지상에 강림한 메시아로서, 저희에게 나아갈 길을 손수 보여주셨죠.

1000640930.english: Master is strong enough to make Poi gasp for breath without even lifting a finger, you know? Do you need more?
1000640930.korean: 주인님은 포이를 손가락 하나 까딱 못한 채 헐떡이게 만들 정도로 강하다구~? 더 필요해?

1000640931.english: Hmph. You lost to a nobody like that? I can imagine what you're like.
1000640931.korean: 흥. 그깟 인간한테 진단 말야? 너도 알만하네.
